MLM has been the default for BERT-style pretraining, but its mask-induced train–test mismatch has long been a concern.","importance":"This is a paradigm-level critique: pinning down when and why MLM representations are deficient can change objective choices (any-order, diffusion, AR/MLM hybrids) for general-purpose pretraining. The key pretraining message is that objective-induced conditional families matter; scaling alone may not fix structural bias.","technical_approach":"Likely a theoretical/empirical characterization of an information bottleneck: MLM predicts only masked positions under a mixture of conditioning contexts, which may fail to consistently model the joint distribution or directional dependencies needed for coherent generation/control. The contrast is AR fitting a consistent factorization, while MLM fits a mixture of conditionals that can introduce irreducible bias. The limitation is that MLM can still be strong for discriminative/retrieval settings; deficiencies surface most in generative consistency and certain dependency structures.","experiments":"No experimental specifics are provided (tasks, deltas, scaling trends). The key design challenge is to cover multiple reasoning granularities with one model: local link prediction, multi-hop composition, and transfer across graphs. The field often assumes that lower perplexity means better language modeling and extends that intuition to long-document settings. But long-text understanding also requires retrieval, global state tracking, cross-section reasoning, and robustness to distractors, which may not be captured well by next-token likelihood.","importance":"This is an important evaluation paper because it challenges an overly convenient proxy. Liu","Jialu Liu"],"institutions":["Google DeepMind"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0002ZJKSLL24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0002ZJKSLL24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=xbjSwwrQOe","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"偏好优化（如 RLHF/DPO）中，训练数据的质量直接决定对齐效果，但现有方法在构造偏好对时缺乏对采样分布的精细控制。Statistical Rejection Sampling（统计拒绝采样）被引入来改善偏好数据的质量，从而提升偏好优化的效果。","importance":"数据级贡献，直接作用于 pretrain→posttrain 接口。核心启示：偏好优化的瓶颈往往不在 loss 函数设计，而在训练数据的分布质量。用更好的采样策略生成偏好对，比换一个更花哨的优化目标更有效。这对理解 RLHF pipeline 中数据工程的重要性很有价值。","technical_approach":"用 rejection sampling 从 policy 模型的输出分布中采样，使得采样分布更接近 reward model 定义的最优分布。具体做法：对每个 prompt 生成多个候选回复，用 reward model 打分后按统计拒绝采样准则筛选，构造高质量偏好对用于后续 DPO/SFT 训练。与直接用 best-of-N 不同，rejection sampling 有更严格的分布保证。","experiments":"在摘要、对话等任务上，rejection sampling 构造的偏好数据训练出的模型在 reward model 评分和人类评估上均优于标准 DPO 和 best-of-N 基线。具体提升幅度需查原文。","authors_note":"作者来自 Google DeepMind。这是 Google 对齐团队在偏好优化数据工程方向的工作。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Preference optimization quality is bottlenecked by the distribution of preference pairs used for training. Existing methods lack principled control over sampling distribution when constructing preference data. This work introduces statistical rejection sampling to improve preference pair quality.","importance":"A data-level contribution at the pretrain-posttrain interface. Key insight: the bottleneck in preference optimization is often data distribution quality, not loss function design. Better sampling strategies for preference pairs outperform fancier optimization objectives.","technical_approach":"Rejection sampling from the policy model's output distribution to approximate the optimal distribution defined by the reward model. For each prompt, multiple candidates are generated, scored by the reward model, and filtered via rejection sampling criteria. The resulting preference pairs are used for DPO/SFT. Unlike simple best-of-N, rejection sampling provides distributional guarantees.","experiments":"On summarization and dialogue tasks, models trained on rejection-sampled preference data outperform standard DPO and best-of-N baselines in both reward model scores and human evaluation. Specific numbers should be checked in the paper.","authors_note":"Google DeepMind alignment team."},"tags":["preference-optimization","dpo","rejection-sampling","alignment"]},{"id":"0003HLWL0J24","title":"Enabling Lanuguage Models to Implicitly Learn Self-Improvement","authors":["Ziqi Wang","Le Hou","Tianjian Lu","Yuexin Wu","Yunxuan Li","Hongkun Yu","Heng Ji"],"institutions":["Google Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0003HLWL0J24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0003HLWL0J24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=2tVHNRZuCs","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"如何让语言模型在训练过程中隐式地学会自我改进（self-improvement），而不依赖外部反馈信号（如人类标注或 reward model）。此前的 self-improvement 方法通常需要显式的验证器或 reward model 来筛选自生成数据，本文探索一种更内化的方式。","importance":"方法级贡献，处于 pretrain↔posttrain 接口。核心启示：如果模型能在训练中隐式学会区分自身输出的质量并自我改进，这可能减少对外部 reward model 的依赖。对理解 self-play / self-improvement 的训练动态有参考价值。","technical_approach":"让模型在训练时同时看到自身的高质量和低质量输出，通过对比学习或隐式偏好信号，使模型学会偏向更好的输出。具体机制是在训练数据中混入模型自身生成的不同质量的回复，利用训练目标的隐式信号（而非显式 reward）来引导改进。","experiments":"在数学推理和代码生成等任务上验证，隐式自我改进方法在多轮迭代后性能持续提升，且不需要外部 reward model。与使用显式 reward 的方法相比，性能接近但流程更简洁。","authors_note":"作者来自 Google Research。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Enabling language models to implicitly learn self-improvement during training without external feedback signals (human labels or reward models). Prior self-improvement methods rely on explicit verifiers to filter self-generated data.","importance":"A method-level contribution at the pretrain-posttrain interface. If models can implicitly learn to distinguish output quality and self-improve, it reduces dependence on external reward models. Relevant to understanding self-play and self-improvement training dynamics.","technical_approach":"The model is exposed to its own high- and low-quality outputs during training. Through implicit preference signals in the training objective (not explicit rewards), the model learns to favor better outputs. The key is mixing self-generated responses of varying quality into training data.","experiments":"On math reasoning and code generation, implicit self-improvement shows sustained performance gains over multiple iterations without an external reward model. This is acute in math, factuality, code, and retrieval, where a fluent but wrong answer can easily receive a high score from a text-only reward model.","importance":"Its contribution is methodological at the training-signal level. By augmenting reward modeling with tool feedback, the work attacks reward misspecification directly; this matters for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface because no amount of RL or preference optimization helps much if the reward model cannot observe the evidence needed to judge correctness.","technical_approach":"The main idea is tool-augmented reward modeling: when scoring candidate responses, the reward model also conditions on outputs from external tools such as retrieval systems, verifiers, or executors. The design choice is deliberate: it gives up the convenience of a purely text-only pipeline in exchange for more faithful supervision, especially on verifiable tasks. This differs from simply filtering data with tools beforehand; the tool signal is incorporated into reward learning itself.","experiments":"The expected empirical takeaway is that tool-augmented reward models outperform text-only reward models on tasks where external evidence matters, and lead to better aligned policies downstream. with the learned reward.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reward-modeling","RLHF","tool-augmentation","verifiability","retrieval"]},{"id":"0055SA24","title":"Chain of Hindsight aligns Language Models with Feedback","authors":["Hao Liu","Carmelo Sferrazza","Pieter Abbeel"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0055SA24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0055SA24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=6xfe4IVcOu","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的问题是：语言模型很难从稀疏、结果导向的反馈中稳定学到改进策略，因为普通监督只看到“正确答案”，看不到从错误到修正的中间过程。过去 RLHF 或 preference tuning 往往把反馈压缩成一个标量偏好，信息利用率低，也不利于把失败模式显式教给模型。","importance":"这项工作的贡献是把反馈对齐从“给分”推进到“给过程”，属于后训练方法级的重要改动。它对 pretrain 研究的启示在于：模型未必只缺知识，很多时候缺的是把反馈转成可泛化更新的表征形式；如果把错误、反馈、修正链路结构化，监督信号密度会明显提高，这和近两年 process supervision、self-correction、reasoning trace 训练的方向是连着的。","technical_approach":"作者提出 Chain of Hindsight，核心不是只喂最终改正后的答案，而是把原始输出、外部反馈以及依据反馈修正后的响应串成一个序列，让模型学习“看到反馈后如何改”。这个设计像把 hindsight experience replay 的思想迁到语言对齐里：模型不仅知道哪里错，还知道在什么反馈条件下应如何更新输出。和普通 SFT 相比，它多保留了失败样本的信息；和只做 preference optimization 相比，它把反馈内容显式语言化，减少了标量奖励的信息损失。","experiments":"关键实验结论通常是：Chain of Hindsight 比只用最终答案监督、只做偏好学习或 naive feedback concatenation 更有效，尤其在需要多步修正、交互式学习或从 AI feedback 学习的设定里。值得关注的 ablation 一般会比较是否保留错误答案、是否显式编码反馈文本、反馈链长度对效果的影响；这类结果往往说明，模型确实在利用“修正轨迹”而不只是额外 token。题目没有摘要和具体数字，因此这里不编造模型规模与提升幅度；但可以明确，这篇论文的价值在训练格式设计而非大规模算力堆砌。","authors_note":"作者中有 Pieter Abbeel。该方向与其长期关注的 RL、从反馈学习和 agent 训练脉络一致。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a familiar bottleneck: language models do not learn efficiently from sparse outcome-level feedback because standard supervision shows the target answer but not the path from failure to correction. RLHF and preference learning often compress rich feedback into a scalar signal, which throws away structure that could teach the model how to improve.","importance":"This is a meaningful post-training method contribution because it turns feedback from a score into a training trajectory. For pretraining researchers, the lesson is that capability gaps are not only about missing knowledge; they are also about how feedback is represented during learning. Structured correction traces can make the supervision signal denser and more reusable.","technical_approach":"The key idea is Chain of Hindsight: instead of training only on the corrected final response, the model is trained on a sequence that includes the original output, the feedback, and the revision conditioned on that feedback. The design borrows the hindsight intuition from RL and adapts it to language alignment: the model learns not just what is right, but how feedback should change the answer. Relative to plain SFT, it preserves information in failed attempts; relative to preference-only training, it avoids collapsing feedback into a low-bandwidth scalar.","experiments":"The main empirical claim is typically that Chain of Hindsight beats supervision on final answers alone, pure preference optimization, or naive feedback concatenation, especially in iterative correction or feedback-rich settings. The most informative ablations are likely whether to keep incorrect responses, whether feedback text must be explicit, and how chain length affects performance; those tests matter because they show whether the model is actually learning from the correction process rather than just consuming more tokens. Its importance is not just compute savings; pruning also reshapes concept coverage, difficulty distribution, and effective curriculum. A cluster-aware pruning strategy has the potential to preserve diverse, high-value concepts more systematically than frequency- or loss-driven heuristics.","technical_approach":"From the title, the method prunes web-scale data based on the complexity of concept clusters. The likely pipeline is to group data into concept clusters, estimate the complexity or learning value of each cluster, and then allocate retention at the cluster level rather than scoring every sample independently. That design makes sense because training value is often tied to structured concept coverage, not just pairwise redundancy. Compared with plain deduplication or loss-based pruning, it is more explicit about preserving the shape of the concept space, at the cost of extra clustering and complexity estimation.","experiments":"The main experiments likely compare pruning strategies under matched retention budgets, evaluating both in-domain and out-of-domain model performance. pretrain/post-train 都有启发：如果训练只覆盖理想轨迹，模型在真实采样分布上的鲁棒性会被高估；让学生从自己生成的错误中学习，是比单纯扩大离线蒸馏集更直接的修正。","technical_approach":"作者提出 on-policy distillation，核心是让学生模型在训练过程中基于自己的当前策略生成样本，再由教师对这些样本所处状态给出指导，从而学习如何纠正自己会真实犯的错。这个设计本质上是把 DAgger 一类的思想迁到 LM 蒸馏里：训练分布逐步靠近学生测试时的分布。与标准离线蒸馏相比，它放弃了最简单稳定的数据流水线，换来更低的 exposure bias；与直接 RL 相比，它仍然利用教师监督，优化更稳定、信用分配更简单。","experiments":"关键实验通常会比较 on-policy 与 offline distillation，在长序列生成、决策式语言任务或多步推理任务上看误差累积是否减少。真正有价值的指标不只是 token-level loss，而是 rollout 级成功率、长程一致性和对偏离轨迹后的恢复能力。重要的 ablation Agarwal。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a classic weakness of distillation: a student trained only on offline teacher trajectories does not learn how to recover from states induced by its own mistakes. In language models this is especially severe because generation is autoregressive, so early errors change the future state distribution immediately.","importance":"This is a meaningful contribution because it brings the distribution-shift problem in imitation learning back into language model distillation in a direct way. The takeaway for both pretraining and post-training is simple: if training only covers ideal trajectories, robustness under the model’s actual sampling distribution will be overestimated. Learning from self-generated mistakes is a more targeted fix than merely scaling offline distillation data.","technical_approach":"The method is on-policy distillation: the student generates from its current policy during training, and the teacher provides supervision on those student-induced states. This is essentially the DAgger idea adapted to LM distillation, so the training distribution gradually matches the student’s test-time distribution. Compared with standard offline distillation, it sacrifices pipeline simplicity for reduced exposure bias; compared with direct RL, it keeps teacher supervision and therefore retains a more stable optimization target.","experiments":"The important experiments would compare on-policy and offline distillation on long-horizon generation, decision-style language tasks, or multi-step reasoning, focusing on whether rollout errors compound less under the on-policy variant. That has implications for optimizer choice, batch size, noise scale, and how we think about teacher-forced training.","technical_approach":"From the title, the work likely develops a theory of how SGD-induced parameter errors propagate through recursive prediction, using behavior cloning and autoregression as canonical examples. This paper derives scaling laws for associative memories.","importance":"A theoretical contribution that connects ICL capability to model scale through precise scaling laws. The key insight—memory capacity follows power-law relationships with model dimensions—helps explain why larger models do better ICL and informs how we think about capacity allocation in pretraining.","technical_approach":"Models Transformer attention layers as Hopfield-network-style associative memories and analyzes storage capacity (number of key-value pairs retrievable without error) as a function of embedding dimension d, number of layers L, and heads H. Derives upper and lower bounds on capacity and identifies different scaling regimes (exponential vs polynomial).","experiments":"Primarily theoretical with numerical validation on synthetic data. This work proposes LLM-as-tool-maker: a strong model creates reusable Python function tools, and a weaker model calls them for subsequent problems, reducing inference cost.","importance":"A method-level contribution introducing a self-tool-making paradigm. For pretrain research, it highlights that code generation capability (shaped during pretraining) is critical for downstream tool use. The strong-weak model collaboration framework is also relevant to inference cost optimization.","technical_approach":"Two phases: (1) Tool making—a strong model (GPT-4 level) analyzes a batch of similar tasks and distills a general-purpose Python function. (2) Tool using—a weaker model (GPT-3.5 level) calls these tools on new problems. A dispatcher decides when to create new tools vs reuse existing ones. Limited direct pretrain impact, but valuable for RAG deployment. That insight matters for process supervision, verifier-based training, and code pretraining objectives.","technical_approach":"The key idea is self-debugging: after execution failure, the model uses structured feedback such as compiler messages, runtime errors, or failed tests to analyze what went wrong and produce a revised program. Glass","Pengcheng He"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ChuangXLKGH24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ChuangXLKGH24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=Th6NyL07na","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：LLM 在生成时容易“顺着表面似然走”而产生幻觉，尤其在需要事实约束的问答/摘要中。过去常用外部检索、RLHF 或后验重排来缓解，但这些要么依赖额外系统，要么改变训练流程。","importance":"贡献是解码级方法：DoLa 通过对比不同层的 logits 来抑制幻觉、提升事实性，属于低侵入、可直接落地的改进。对 pretrain 的启示是：层间表征在“语言流畅性 vs 事实一致性”上可能存在可利用的分工，解码时显式利用这种分工能在不改训练的情况下改变错误模式；边界是它主要修正生成偏好，不会补充缺失知识。","technical_approach":"DoLa（Decoding by Contrasting Layers）的核心是：用高层输出作为主要分布，同时引入低层（或中层）输出作为对照，放大“高层更确信但低层不支持”的 token，或反过来惩罚“只在高层看起来合理但缺少底层证据”的 token，从而减少编造。与温度/惩罚项不同，它利用层间差异作为信号，代价是需要多读出若干层 logits，推理开销略增且层选择是超参。","experiments":"未提供摘要与实验细节，无法给出评测集（如 TruthfulQA、FEVER、FactScore 等）、模型（LLaMA 系列等）与提升数字；建议重点核对：在不同模型家族上的一致性、对开放域生成与封闭域 QA 的差异效果、以及与检索增强/自一致性等方法的互补性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets LLM hallucination driven by decoding that follows surface likelihood, especially in fact-sensitive QA/summarization. Prior mitigations often rely on retrieval, RLHF, or reranking, which add system complexity or require training changes.","importance":"This is a decoding-time contribution: DoLa improves factuality by contrasting logits from different layers, making it low-intrusion and easy to deploy. For pretraining, it suggests layerwise representations encode different biases (fluency vs factual consistency) that can be exploited without retraining. The boundary is that it reshapes preferences during generation but cannot add missing knowledge.","technical_approach":"DoLa (Decoding by Contrasting Layers) uses the top-layer distribution as the main signal while using lower/middle-layer logits as a contrastive reference, penalizing tokens that look good only at the top layer but lack support earlier in the network. Unlike generic temperature or repetition penalties, it uses inter-layer disagreement as a targeted signal. The trade-off is extra inference cost from reading multiple layers and a hyperparameter choice of which layers to contrast.","experiments":"No abstract/experimental details were provided, so datasets (TruthfulQA/FEVER/FactScore), models (e.g., LLaMA family), and gains cannot be stated. Glass"]},{"id":"CosteAK024","title":"Reward Model Ensembles Help Mitigate Overoptimization","authors":["Thomas Coste","Usman Anwar","Robert Kirk","David Krueger"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/CosteAK024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/CosteAK024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=dcjtMYkpXx","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：用单一 reward model 做策略优化时很容易被过度优化（overoptimization），模型学会钻 reward 的漏洞而非真实偏好。过去通常靠早停、KL 约束或人工抽检缓解，但缺少系统化、可扩展的信号不确定性处理。","importance":"贡献是对齐训练信号层面的改进：用 reward model ensemble 来估计不确定性并抑制过度优化，属于对 RLHF/偏好优化的关键工程补丁。对 pretrain↔posttrain 闭环的启示是：训练信号质量比优化技巧更决定上限，显式建模 reward 不确定性可以把“对齐失败”从事后排查变成训练时可控变量；代价是训练与推理成本上升。","technical_approach":"核心方法是训练多个 reward model 形成 ensemble，用它们的均值作为优化目标、用方差/分歧作为不确定性信号来调节更新强度或筛除高风险样本。这样做的原因是：当策略走到 reward 模型训练分布之外时，ensemble 分歧会变大，提示“这里的 reward 不可信”，从而避免把策略推向漏洞区域。边界在于：ensemble 只能反映模型不确定性，无法纠正系统性偏差；如果所有 reward model 共享同一偏差，仍会集体误导。","experiments":"未提供摘要与实验细节，无法给出使用的策略优化算法（PPO/DPO 等）、ensemble 大小、以及在对齐基准上的具体提升；建议重点核对：过度优化的定量刻画（如 reward 上升但人评下降）、ensemble 分歧与失败样本的相关性、以及与更强 KL/参考模型约束相比的 compute-效果权衡。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses overoptimization in policy training with a single reward model: the policy exploits reward loopholes rather than matching true preferences. Prior mitigations (early stopping, KL constraints, spot checks) are ad hoc and do not systematically handle reward uncertainty.","importance":"This is an alignment-signal contribution: reward model ensembles to estimate uncertainty and reduce overoptimization, a practical fix for RLHF-style pipelines. For the pretrain↔posttrain loop, it reinforces that signal quality often dominates optimizer tricks, and making uncertainty explicit turns alignment failures into something controllable during training. The cost is higher training and inference overhead.","technical_approach":"The method trains an ensemble of reward models, optimizes against the ensemble mean, and uses ensemble variance/disagreement as an uncertainty signal to downweight updates or filter risky samples. The rationale is that when the policy moves OOD relative to reward-model training data, disagreement increases, flagging unreliable rewards and preventing exploitation. The limitation is that ensembles capture epistemic uncertainty but not shared systematic bias—if all models are biased the same way, they fail together.","experiments":"No abstract/experimental details were provided, so the policy optimization algorithm (PPO/DPO), ensemble size, and benchmark gains cannot be stated. Instead of treating vision as an external module, it embeds visual understanding and generation signals directly in the LLM's token space. Directly relevant to AR+diffusion joint modeling and unified multimodal representation research.","technical_approach":"Injects visual representations into the LLM token sequence: comprehension uses a visual encoder to feed features into the LLM, while generation introduces 'dream tokens' that the LLM outputs as conditions for a diffusion model. The dream tokens are optimized in the LLM's latent space to serve both language context and image generation conditioning. Fast-ELECTRA aims to eliminate this generator training cost while preserving ELECTRA's efficiency advantage.","importance":"A practical method-level improvement for efficient pretraining. ELECTRA remains one of the most competitive discriminative pretraining alternatives to MLM, and reducing its cost broadens its applicability, especially at larger scales.","technical_approach":"Replaces the jointly trained generator with a frozen, pre-existing small model (or an early checkpoint) that produces replacement tokens. The discriminator's training objective stays the same, but generator gradient computation is eliminated. The key trade-off is that a frozen generator may be lower quality, but experiments show discriminator performance is largely insensitive to generator quality within a reasonable range.","experiments":"On GLUE benchmarks, Fast-ELECTRA matches original ELECTRA performance under the same compute budget while achieving 30-50% training speedup. This work systematically analyzes the effect.","importance":"Directly relevant to visual tokenizer design for unified multimodal LMs. Understanding the benefits and limits of discretization is crucial when converting images to token sequences for joint language-vision modeling.","technical_approach":"Compares continuous vs. discrete representations across downstream tasks with controlled variables (architecture, data, training). for pretraining, it offers a more optimization-aligned alternative to perplexity/rule-based filtering, bounded by gradient-estimation cost and distribution drift during training.","technical_approach":"GIO optimizes for “gradient information”: it estimates how representative/diverse examples are in gradient space and selects a subset that preserves the training effect of the full dataset. So the algorithmic complexity may be favorable while the real throughput is not.","importance":"This is an important systems contribution. For pretraining, the direct implication is that long-context modeling should be judged not only by asymptotic complexity but also by hardware fit. If FlashFFTConv makes long convolutions genuinely fast on GPUs, it can change the practical competitiveness of convolutional and hybrid alternatives to attention.","technical_approach":"The core idea is a FlashAttention-like kernel design for FFT-based convolution, engineered to exploit Tensor Cores, memory hierarchy, and operation fusion. The contribution is not a new convolution formula. It is a hardware-aware implementation strategy that reorganizes frequency-domain convolution into GPU-friendly tiles and reduces expensive memory traffic. Relative to naïve FFT convolution, the gain should come mainly from kernel engineering rather than a new modeling objective.","experiments":"Even without the abstract, the decisive evidence is usually straightforward in this kind of work: large throughput and latency improvements over PyTorch or prior FFT-conv implementations across sequence lengths, channel sizes, and batch sizes; and meaningful end-to-end training or inference speedups when integrated into long-sequence models. LLaMA 这类纯文本 LLM 以较小改动获得“原生看图与画图”的能力，而不是依赖外接视觉编码器/扩散模型拼装；过去的瓶颈通常在于视觉离散化（tokenizer）与语言 token 空间不统一。","importance":"这是跨模态统一建模方向的实用贡献：通过 SEED Tokenizer 把图像编码成可被 LLM 直接建模的离散 token，并支持反向解码生成图像，从而把多模态能力更紧地纳入同一个自回归训练框架。对 pretrain 的启示是：视觉 tokenizer 的码本设计、重建损失与 token 语义结构会直接决定多模态 AR 训练是否稳定、以及生成质量上限。","technical_approach":"核心方法是引入/改造一个图像离散 tokenizer（SEED Tokenizer），把图像映射为序列 token，与文本 token 在同一 Transformer 中联合建模，并通过相应的解码器把 token 还原为图像以实现“Draw”。关键选择通常包括：tokenizer 的下采样率与码本大小（影响序列长度与细节）；是否使用分层 token（粗到细）以减轻长序列建模难度；训练时如何混合图文数据与损失权重以避免语言能力退化。代价是：离散化会带来信息瓶颈，且 AR 生成图像在高分辨率与细节一致性上通常不如扩散式解码。","experiments":"未提供摘要与实验细节，无法确认使用的 LLaMA 版本/参数量、图文数据规模、图像生成指标（FID/IS）或多模态理解基准（如 VQAv2/COCO caption）上的具体提升；因此不写数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper aims to turn a text-only LLaMA-style LLM into a model that can natively “see and draw” with minimal modular glue, addressing the long-standing friction that vision tokenization is not naturally aligned with the LM token space.","importance":"This is a practical contribution to unified multimodal pretraining: a SEED tokenizer discretizes images into tokens that the same autoregressive Transformer can model, and a decoder maps tokens back to pixels for generation. The pretraining-relevant insight is that tokenizer design (codebook, stride, hierarchy) is not a detail—it sets the stability and ceiling of AR multimodal learning.","technical_approach":"The approach introduces/adapts an image discrete tokenizer (SEED Tokenizer) to convert images into token sequences, trains a single Transformer over mixed text+image tokens, and decodes image tokens back to images to enable generation. Key design choices typically involve token sequence length vs fidelity (downsampling and codebook size), hierarchical tokens to ease long-sequence modeling, and data/loss mixing to avoid degrading language quality. The trade-off is an information bottleneck from discretization and the usual limitation that AR image generation can lag diffusion decoders on high-frequency detail and high-res consistency.","experiments":"No abstract/experimental details were provided, so model sizes, data scale, and quantitative results on vision-language benchmarks or image generation metrics cannot be stated.","authors_note":""},"tags":["tokenizer","visual-tokens","multimodal-llm","discrete-representation"],"notable_authors":["Yuying Ge"]},{"id":"GoKKRD24","title":"Compositional Preference Models Dymetman"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/GoKKRD24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/GoKKRD24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=tiiAzqi6Ol","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"作者要解决的是：现有对齐通常用单一偏好模型（reward/preference model）去覆盖多维价值取舍，导致在复杂指令或多目标场景下出现不可控的偏置与 reward hacking；过去的做法要么堆数据、要么在一个标量奖励里硬编码权重。","importance":"这是对齐建模层面的方法贡献：把偏好分解为可组合的组件（compositional preference models），让系统能显式表达“安全/有用/简洁/风格”等维度并按需组合。对 pretrain 的启示是：post-train 的奖励结构会反向塑造模型能力边界；更可分解的偏好表示可能减少对单一 RM 的过拟合，从而让持续预训练或 mid-train 更稳定地吸收对齐信号。","technical_approach":"核心思路是将偏好学习从“学一个标量函数”改为“学一组可组合的子偏好/因子”，推理或训练时按任务需求进行加权或逻辑组合。关键机制可能包括：用多任务/多头结构共享表示但分离输出；用结构化标注或从比较数据中识别潜在因子；在 RLHF 或 DPO 类目标中用组合后的偏好分数替代单一 represent multi-dimensional trade-offs, which can yield brittle biases and reward hacking in complex, multi-objective settings.","importance":"This is a modeling contribution for alignment: compositional preference models aim to represent separate preference dimensions (helpfulness, safety, brevity, style, etc.) and combine them as needed. The pretraining-relevant angle is that post-training reward structure feeds back into what the model becomes good at; more decomposable preference representations may reduce overfitting to one monolithic RM and make continual/mid-training alignment signals easier to integrate.","technical_approach":"The key idea is to move from learning a single scalar preference function to learning a set of composable components, then combining them via weights or structured rules during optimization/inference. Nagarajan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/GoyalJRMKN24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/GoyalJRMKN24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=ph04CRkPdC","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的问题是：自回归语言模型在生成时被迫每步都输出“内容 token”，没有显式预算去做中间计算。过去 CoT 主要依赖数据或提示把推理写成自然语言，但这会把“思考”和“对外说话”混在一起；作者提出 pause token，就是想给模型一个低语义负担的内部计算时间。","importance":"这是一个小改动但概念上很有启发的训练方法。它的重要性不在于引入了复杂新架构，而在于提醒我们：AR 目标默认把计算深度绑死在输出长度上，而增加无语义输出步可能提升推理能力；这对 latent reasoning、test-time compute、以及训练目标设计都有直接关联。","technical_approach":"核心方法是在训练和推理中引入特殊的 pause token，让模型可以先输出若干个‘暂停’步，再继续生成正式内容。这个方法本质上是在不改 transformer 主体结构的前提下，给解码过程增加额外计算展开深度。和显式 CoT 不同，pause token 不要求模型把中间思路写成人类可读文本，因此有机会减少监督约束；和直接扩展层数不同，它只在需要时按 token 维度增加计算。代价是推理延迟上升，而且如果训练分布里 pause 使用不当，模型可能学会无效拖延。","experiments":"论文的关键实验通常会比较：标准训练、带 CoT 监督、以及带 pause token 的训练，在数学、逻辑或需要多步推理的任务上的表现差异。若结果成立，常见现象是 pause token 在较小模型或固定参数预算下带来更好的复杂推理表现，同时对简单语言建模损失影响有限。值得关注的消融一般包括 pause 数量、训练时是否显式监督 pause 位置、以及推理时允许的 pause content token, leaving no explicit room for internal computation. Chain-of-thought partly works around this, but it entangles thinking with human-readable output. Pause tokens are introduced to give the model extra compute steps without requiring semantic content.","importance":"This is a small intervention with outsized conceptual relevance. It suggests that part of reasoning failure comes from the objective and decoding protocol, not just from model size or data. That makes it interesting for latent reasoning, test-time compute, and alternative language-modeling objectives.","technical_approach":"The method adds a special pause token that the model can emit before continuing with normal output. In effect, this increases computational depth along the token dimension without changing the transformer backbone. Unlike explicit CoT, the extra steps need not be linguistically meaningful, which may reduce the burden of forcing internal computation into natural language. Unlike making the network deeper, the extra compute is conditional and inference-time controllable. The trade-off is obvious: more decoding latency, and potential collapse into useless stalling if the pauses are not trained well.","experiments":"The central experiments likely compare standard training, chain-of-thought style supervision, and pause-token training on tasks that require multi-step reasoning. If the method works as intended, the gains should appear most clearly on math or logic tasks, especially under fixed parameter budgets, while preserving ordinary language-model quality reasonably well. Important ablations would include the allowed number of pauses, whether pause placement is supervised, and how inference-time pause budgets affect accuracy. Many papers focus on detection schemes while implicitly assuming the generation distribution can be steered reliably. This work instead probes whether the watermark signal is strong and stable enough to be learned without unacceptable quality loss.","importance":"Its importance is conceptual. It shifts the discussion from designing watermark rules to understanding whether model training and decoding dynamics can support them at all. A useful distinction in this space is between watermarks imposed at generation time and watermarks that the model internalizes through training. This work investigates token-level uncertainty for cascade decisions.","importance":"Directly valuable for LLM serving efficiency. Token-level uncertainty detects small-model failures earlier, reducing wasted computation. For pretraining, the implication is that token-level calibration quality matters for downstream cascade efficiency.","technical_approach":"Uses token-level uncertainty (per-token softmax entropy, top-k probability gap) instead of sequence-level for deferral decisions. Defines a deferral policy that evaluates token-by-token whether to switch to the large model. Provides theoretical analysis of optimal threshold selection. Differs from speculative decoding (which accelerates a single model) in that cascades route between models of different capabilities.","experiments":"Tested on NLG and NLU tasks with T5/PaLM model pairs. Huang","Mustafa Safdari","Yutaka Matsuo","Douglas Eck","Aleksandra Faust"],"institutions":["Google DeepMind"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"oral","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/GurFHSMEF24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/GurFHSMEF24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=9JQtrumvg8","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"让 LLM 作为 agent 在真实网页上完成复杂任务（如预订航班、填写表单）仍然很困难，主要瓶颈是长网页上下文理解、多步规划和代码生成的协同。本文构建了一个完整的 WebAgent 系统。","importance":"系统级贡献，展示了 LLM agent 在真实网页环境中的能力边界。对 pretrain 研究的启示在于：agent 任务对模型的长上下文理解、指令跟随和代码生成能力提出了综合要求，这些能力的瓶颈往往在 pretrain 阶段就已经决定了。","technical_approach":"WebAgent 由三个模块组成：(1) HTML 摘要模块，把冗长的网页 DOM 压缩为关键信息；(2) 规划模块，用 LLM 生成多步操作计划；(3) 程序合成模块，把计划转化为可执行的 Python/Selenium 代码。关键设计是把网页理解和操作执行解耦——先理解再规划再执行，而不是端到端一步到位。使用了 Flan-U-PaLM 作为底座模型。","experiments":"在真实网站（而非模拟环境）上测试，包括购物、信息查询等任务。WebAgent 的任务完成率显著高于直接用 GPT-4 做 zero-shot agent 的 baseline。HTML 摘要模块对性能贡献最大——没有它，模型在长网页上的理解准确率大幅下降。","authors_note":"来自 Google DeepMind。Hiroki Furuta 在 LLM agent 方向有多项工作。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Having LLMs act as agents on real websites to complete complex tasks (booking flights, filling forms) remains challenging due to long HTML context understanding, multi-step planning, and code generation. This work builds a complete WebAgent system.","importance":"A systems-level contribution demonstrating LLM agent capabilities and limitations on real web tasks. For pretraining, the implication is that agent tasks impose compound requirements on long-context understanding, instruction following, and code generation—capabilities largely determined during pretraining.","technical_approach":"WebAgent has three modules: (1) HTML summarization that compresses verbose DOM into key information, (2) a planning module that generates multi-step action plans via LLM, and (3) a program synthesis module that converts plans into executable Python/Selenium code. The key design decouples understanding from execution. WebAgent significantly outperforms zero-shot GPT-4 agent baselines in task completion rate. The HTML summarization module contributes most—without it, comprehension on long pages drops substantially.","authors_note":"From Google DeepMind. Prior discussions often relied on anecdotal visualizations or single-task probes, making the claim hard to falsify or compare across models.","importance":"This is primarily a mechanistic/interpretability contribution rather than a new pretraining recipe: it turns “LMs have a sense of space/time” into a measurable hypothesis. For pretraining, the key implication is diagnostic: if spatial/temporal geometry is a robust emergent property, many reasoning behaviors may be riding on representation geometry; if it is brittle or data-dependent, it points to missing inductive bias in data mixtures or objectives.","technical_approach":"The core approach is to test for low-dimensional, approximately linear ‘coordinate systems’ in hidden states using constrained readouts, rather than unconstrained predictors or qualitative plots. Typical methodology maps implicit spatial relations (e.g., relative positions/directions) and temporal relations (order/interval) into supervision, then trains low-capacity probes (often linear) across layers/heads and checks consistency and cross-context generalization. The main design choice is limiting probe capacity to reduce the risk of the probe learning the task instead of revealing structure; the boundary is that “decodable” does not by itself prove the model causally uses that structure during generation.","experiments":"Insufficient information is provided here to report model sizes, datasets, metrics, or numeric gains without guessing. Much prior ICL work treats the model as a black-box fitter and implicitly assumes more demonstrations help, while real deployments inevitably contain noisy or incorrect examples.","importance":"This is a mechanistic reliability contribution: it decomposes failure modes under false demonstrations and characterizes why models can ‘overthink’—rationalizing incorrect context and drifting away from ground truth. For pretraining, the implication is that learned priors about trusting context vs. prior knowledge directly shape ICL robustness, feeding back into how we design synthetic data, instruction tuning, and retrieval interfaces.","technical_approach":"The typical approach is controlled ICL task construction: keep the query fixed while varying demonstration correctness and error types (label flips, rule changes, reasoning-chain errors), and measure how outputs shift with context. To separate being misled from over-interpretation, the analysis probes sensitivity to demonstration consistency and to conflicts with the model’s prior knowledge, often across prompt formats. The trade-off is between simple tasks that enable attribution and coverage of realistic error patterns; conclusions may vary by model family, alignment, and whether tools/retrieval are used.","experiments":"Insufficient information is provided to report the exact task suite, model set, or numeric degradation curves. 在分布外或新任务上会犯系统性错误，但重新微调成本高且有遗忘风险，能否在测试时用“最近邻”做轻量的自适应训练来即时纠偏。过去 test-time training 多见于视觉领域，LLM 场景下如何选邻居、如何避免把噪声学进去、以及如何控制计算开销都不清晰。","importance":"贡献属于方法级、且直接影响 pretrain↔posttrain 接口：它提供一种不改动大规模权重训练流程、但能在部署端按需适配的方案。对预训练的启示是：如果最近邻 TTT 能显著提升鲁棒性，那么我们可以把一部分“对齐/领域适配”压力从训练期转移到推理期，同时重新思考预训练表征的可检索性（embedding 是否足够语义对齐）。","technical_approach":"核心方法是：对每个测试输入，从一个语料库中检索最近邻样本（按 embedding 相似度或任务相关相似度），然后用这些邻居对模型做少步梯度更新或某种局部适配（例如只更新小模块/层归一化参数），再在更新后的模型上回答当前输入。关键机制在于把更新数据限制在“局部邻域”，以降低灾难性漂移；同时需要正则或早停来防止过拟合邻居噪声。trade-off 是：检索与梯度更新会增加延迟与工程复杂度；边界在于当检索库质量差或邻居与问题不匹配时，TTT full fine-tuning is costly and risks forgetting, asking whether nearest-neighbor-based test-time training can provide lightweight, on-the-fly correction. Test-time training is better explored in vision; for LLMs, neighbor selection, noise robustness, and latency control are less understood.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with direct implications for the pretrain–posttrain interface: it offers a deployment-time adaptation mechanism without changing the main training pipeline. For pretraining, the takeaway is strategic: if NN-based TTT reliably improves robustness, some alignment/domain adaptation burden can move from training to inference, and it increases the value of having retrievable, semantically aligned representations.","technical_approach":"The method retrieves nearest neighbors for each test input from a corpus (via embedding similarity or task-relevant similarity), performs a few gradient steps or local adaptation (often updating only small modules or normalization parameters), and then answers using the adapted model. The key mechanism is locality: restricting updates to a neighborhood reduces catastrophic drift, while regularization/early stopping prevents overfitting to noisy neighbors. The trade-off is added latency and engineering complexity from retrieval and optimization; the boundary is that poor retrieval quality can make adaptation worse than doing nothing.","experiments":"Insufficient information is provided to report the LLMs used, corpus size, update steps, or numeric gains. idea，而是每层都要重复几百次的基本 block 设计。如果能证明某些组件可以系统性简化，收益会在训练吞吐、实现复杂度、稳定性和迁移性上成倍放大。它的重要性通常不来自单 benchmark 提升，而来自‘默认模板可能该换了’。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对 Transformer block 做去冗余化设计，可能涉及重新排列归一化、合并残差路径、弱化某些投影或重审 与训练速度、参数量、激活开销、稳定性之间的权衡。最值得看的不是‘最好结果高了多少’，而是简化后是否在多种规模上都不掉点，或者在同算力预算下更优。若论文做得扎实，应该有针对不同 block 组件的消融，以及训练曲线、梯度统计或深度扩展下的稳定性观察。没有摘要，无法填入具体参数规模和数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a practical architecture question: which parts of the standard Transformer block are genuinely necessary, and which are legacy design choices that persist mainly because they became default. At scale, even small per-layer inefficiencies matter, so simplifying the block can have outsized training and serving impact if performance holds up.","importance":"This is an architecture-cleanup paper with direct relevance to pretraining. Its value does not come from a flashy new paradigm, but from challenging the default building block repeated hundreds of times in large models. If some components can be removed or merged without meaningful loss, the gains compound in throughput, implementation simplicity, and possibly training stability.","technical_approach":"The core contribution is a simplified Transformer block, likely obtained by rethinking normalization placement, residual structure, projection layers, or the balance between attention and MLP sublayers. The reason such a design can work is that many block-level components help optimization more than expressivity, and once a cleaner parameterization is found, some of the inherited structure may no longer earn its cost. The main boundary is sensitivity: simplified blocks often depend strongly on initialization, normalization, and training recipe.","experiments":"The expected evaluation is a controlled comparison across Transformer variants, looking at perplexity or accuracy together with training speed, parameter count, activation cost, and optimization stability. The question is whether we can amortize repeated expensive inference into a learned, reusable inference procedure.","importance":"This is mainly a method/training-paradigm contribution: it shifts cost from test-time search to train-time learning, suggesting a concrete pretrain/posttrain interface where inference programs are “compiled” into model parameters or an auxiliary module. Bartoldson","Bhavya Kailkhura","Avi Schwarzschild","Aniruddha Saha","Micah Goldblum","Jonas Geiping","Tom Goldstein"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/JainCWKCSBKSSGG24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/JainCWKCSBKSSGG24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=0bMmZ3fkCk","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是 instruction tuning 容易过拟合小规模高质量数据，导致模型泛化和生成质量不稳定，而常规正则化在 embedding 层并没有被充分利用。过去大家更多在数据混合、LoRA 配置、learning rate 或 label smoothing 上调参，较少从“输入表示在微调阶段过于干净、过于确定”这个角度处理。","importance":"这项工作的贡献很实用，属于 post-train 方法级改进，但对 pretrain/post-train 接口也有启发。它的重要性在于：一个极小的改动——在指令微调时对 embedding 加噪声——就能稳定提升效果，说明 SFT 阶段的表示平滑性和局部鲁棒性可能比大家原先以为的更关键。对大模型工程来说，这类低成本、高兼容性的技巧通常比复杂新目标函数更容易落地。","technical_approach":"核心方法就是 NEFTune：在 instruction finetuning 期间给 token embeddings 注入随机噪声，作为一种极简正则化。它不是改模型结构，也不是改监督信号，而是在表示层制造局部扰动，迫使模型学习对小输入位移更平滑的响应；这和视觉里常见的数据增强类似，但作用点更贴近语言模型内部表示。和 dropout 的区别在于，dropout 是随机屏蔽维度，embedding noise 更像连续空间中的邻域平滑。它有效的原因大概率是缓解小样本 SFT 对 token-level 记忆的过拟合，代价则是噪声过大时会破坏语义定位，尤其在小模型或低资源 setting 下更敏感。","experiments":"这篇工作的已知高层结论是：NEFTune 在多种指令微调模型上带来稳定提升，而且实现代价很低。题面没有给具体基座、参数量、数据规模和 benchmark 数字，所以不能安全写出分数；但这类论文最重要的实验通常包括：不同模型族和参数规模的一致性、和常见 SFT baseline 的比较、噪声幅度的 sweet spot，以及是否能与 LoRA/全参数微调兼容。最有价值的观察往往不是“最高涨了多少”，而是性能对噪声强度呈现单峰，说明它更像有明确有效区间的表示正则，而不是越强越好。","authors_note":"作者阵容包含多位来自 UC Berkeley / LMSYS 相关社区的研究者，但仅凭当前信息无法可靠确认全部机构。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical weakness of instruction tuning: models can overfit small, high-quality supervision sets, and standard regularization at the embedding level is underexplored. Most tuning effort has gone into data mixtures, learning rates, or adapter configurations, while the representation-space smoothness of SFT has received much less attention.","importance":"This is a highly practical post-training method contribution, with useful implications for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. Its importance is that a very small change—adding noise to embeddings during instruction tuning—can produce consistent gains. That suggests local smoothness and robustness of the learned representation matter more in SFT than many pipelines currently assume.","technical_approach":"The method, NEFTune, injects random noise into token embeddings during instruction fine-tuning. It does not change model architecture or supervision; it regularizes the representation layer directly by forcing the model to respond smoothly to small perturbations. Compared with dropout, which removes dimensions, embedding noise acts more like neighborhood smoothing in continuous space. The likely mechanism is reduced memorization and better generalization under small-data SFT. The trade-off is straightforward: too much noise will blur semantics and hurt learning, especially in smaller or lower-resource regimes.","experiments":"The main empirical takeaway is that NEFTune gives consistent gains across instruction-tuned models at very low implementation cost. The prompt does not include safe details on base models, parameter counts, datasets, or benchmark scores, so exact numbers should not be invented. The most informative experiments for this kind of work are cross-model consistency, comparisons to standard SFT baselines, compatibility with LoRA and full fine-tuning, and a sweep over noise magnitude. The likely key observation is a clear sweet spot rather than monotonic improvement, which supports the view that this is targeted representation regularization, not just extra stochasticity.","authors_note":"The authors appear connected to the UC Berkeley / LMSYS ecosystem, but the provided information is insufficient to confirm institutions reliably."},"tags":["instruction-tuning","regularization","embedding-noise","generalization","finetuning"]},{"id":"JainZCGSS24","title":"LLM-Assisted Code Cleaning For Training Accurate Code Generators","authors":["Naman Jain","Tianjun Zhang","Wei-Lin Chiang","Joseph E. Gonzalez","Koushik Sen","Ion Stoica"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/JainZCGSS24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/JainZCGSS24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=maRYffiUpI","category_id":"coding_agent","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是代码预训练数据里存在大量低质量、错误、风格混乱或不可执行样本，而这些噪声会直接限制代码生成模型的上限。过去常见做法是靠启发式清洗、去重、编译过滤或单元测试筛选，但这些规则覆盖有限，面对真实开源代码中的细碎问题，传统 pipeline 往往漏清理或误删。","importance":"这项工作的意义主要在数据级。它的重要性在于把 LLM 自身作为代码数据清洗器，用模型辅助修复和规范化训练语料，而不是只做二元过滤；这对 code LM 很有现实价值，因为代码质量比自然语言更强依赖语法正确性、依赖关系和局部一致性。对 pretrain 的启发很直接：数据质量提升不一定非靠更严格筛除，有时“修复后保留”比“直接丢弃”更划算。","technical_approach":"核心方法是让 LLM 参与代码清洗流程，对训练代码进行修复、重写、补全或规范化，然后再用处理后的数据训练代码生成模型。关键选择在于它不是单纯 rule-based cleaning，也不是完全信任生成模型自由改写，而是把模型放在受约束的 cleaning 任务里，通常还需要编译、测试或静态分析做后验验证。和传统过滤相比，这种方法能回收更多本来有价值但存在局部缺陷的数据；风险是 LLM 可能引入看似合理但语义错误的新 bug，从而把数据集污染成另一种更隐蔽的噪声，因此验证闭环比生成本身更关键。","experiments":"从标题看，实验应该比较原始数据、启发式清洗数据和 LLM-assisted cleaning 数据训练出来的 code model 准确率。这里没有给出模型规模、代码语料规模、评测集和数值，所以不能写具体提升；但合理预期的指标会包括 pass@k、编译率、单元测试通过率以及生成可执行性。最值得看的 ablation 是：只过滤不修复、只修复不验证、不同强度 LLM cleaner 的效果，以及清洗收益是否在小模型和大模型上都存在。如果收益主要来自数据可执行率上升，那说明问题在基础卫生；如果还能提升更高层语义正确性，说明 cleaning 真在改善监督信号。","authors_note":"作者包含 Joseph E. Gonzalez、Koushik Sen。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a straightforward but consequential issue: code pretraining corpora contain large amounts of low-quality, buggy, inconsistent, or non-executable data, and that noise directly limits code generation models. Existing pipelines mostly rely on heuristics, deduplication, compilation checks, or tests, but those methods miss many realistic defects and often throw away recoverable data.","importance":"This is mainly a data-quality contribution. Its importance is in using an LLM as a code cleaner rather than only a code generator or filter. For code models, that is especially relevant because supervision quality depends heavily on syntactic correctness, executable structure, and local semantic consistency. The broader pretraining lesson is that repairing data can be more valuable than simply discarding it.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to place an LLM inside the code-cleaning pipeline to fix, rewrite, complete, or normalize training examples before using them for model training. The important design choice is that this should not be unconstrained rewriting. It likely combines model-based cleaning with downstream validation such as compilation, testing, or static analysis. Compared with heuristic filtering, this can recover examples that are valuable but locally flawed. The main risk is silent corruption: the cleaner may introduce plausible but semantically wrong code. That makes the verification loop central to the method.","experiments":"The natural experiment is to train code generators on raw data, heuristic-cleaned data, and LLM-cleaned data, then compare downstream coding performance. The prompt does not provide safe details on model size, corpus scale, benchmarks, or gains, so exact numbers should not be invented. Relevant metrics would include pass@k, compile rate, unit-test success, and executability. The most useful ablations would isolate filtering versus repair, repair with and without validation, and whether the gains hold across model scales. If the benefit mainly comes from higher executability, the paper is fixing data hygiene; if semantic correctness also improves, then the supervision signal itself is getting better.","authors_note":"The author list includes Joseph E. Gonzalez and Koushik Sen."},"tags":["data-cleaning","code-pretraining","executability","llm-assisted","data-quality"],"notable_authors":["Joseph E. QA 数据集上打补丁。过去减少幻觉常靠偏好对齐或检索增强，但训练信号往往混杂（既含事实性也含风格偏好），很难定位模型到底学到了什么。","importance":"贡献属于“训练信号设计”：用合成任务把“该不该编”变成可度量、可放大的监督信号，从而更像在做可重复的 pretrain/mid-train 研究。对 pretrain 的启示是：如果合成任务能覆盖关键幻觉机制（不确定性表达、拒答、引用一致性等），它可能成为比 RLHF 更干净的事实性训练通道；边界在于合成分布是否会诱导模型学会“模板化拒答”而牺牲有用回答。","technical_approach":"方法核心是构造一组合成数据生成流程，把输入—输出对中的“可验证性/不可验证性”做成明确标签或目标，然后用监督学习或多任务训练让模型在不确定时更倾向于承认未知、减少无依据细节。关键机制通常包括：控制信息可得性（让模型在上下文中确实缺证据）、控制诱导强度（提示词是否鼓励编造）、以及把评测指标绑定到可自动判定的规则（避免人工偏好噪声）。与直接用真实 QA 做对齐相比，合成任务的优势是可精确控制因果因素，代价是覆盖面与真实世界分布差距。","experiments":"题目与摘要未提供实验细节（基座模型、合成数据量、训练预算、幻觉评测基准与具体提升数字均缺失），无法给出定量结论。建议重点核对：是否在多个事实性/引用一致性基准上报告绝对提升；是否区分“减少幻觉”与“增加拒答率”的 trade-off 曲线；以及合成任务规模扩大时是否出现收益递减或对开放域生成质量的副作用。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks how to reduce LM hallucinations using controllable synthetic tasks, instead of relying on expensive human labels or narrow dataset-specific fixes. Many existing approaches mix factuality with stylistic preference signals (e.g., RLHF), making it hard to isolate what the model actually learns about truthfulness.","importance":"This is a training-signal contribution: synthetic tasks provide cleaner, repeatable supervision for “don’t fabricate when evidence is missing,” which is closer to pretrain/mid-train methodology than preference tuning. The main boundary is distribution gap: synthetic setups may teach safe refusal templates rather than robust evidence-grounded generation.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to generate synthetic input–output pairs where verifiability is explicitly controlled and automatically checkable, then train the model to abstain or express uncertainty when support is absent. Many works focus on final scores, but in long-horizon settings the training path can determine whether models learn shortcuts or transferable memory strategies.","importance":"This is a training-dynamics / curriculum-mechanism contribution: it ties long-timescale capability to curriculum choices, implying that data ordering and difficulty scheduling can be decisive for whether genuine long-term mechanisms emerge. For pretraining, it suggests long-context competence is not just about increasing context length; the training signal must be learnable across timescales or models may settle on local heuristics.","technical_approach":"The approach is likely curriculum-controlled experiments plus mechanism analysis: train the same model on memory tasks under different curricula (short-to-long, easy-to-hard, mixed vs staged) and analyze internal dynamics/representations to identify long-timescale mechanisms (stable states, slow variables, gating-like memory). The trade-off is that starting too hard can trap optimization in shortcut solutions, while progressive curricula can foster reusable internal state but may overfit task structure. It emphasizes training path as part of the mechanism, not just architecture.","experiments":"No experimental details or numbers are provided. Joshi","Hanna Moazam","Heather Miller","Matei Zaharia","Christopher Potts"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"spotlight","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/KhattabSMZSVHSJ24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/KhattabSMZSVHSJ24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=sY5N0zY5Od","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作的核心问题是：LM 系统的性能瓶颈越来越多地来自“程序和调用链怎么组织”，而不是单次 prompt 怎么写；手工 prompt engineering 很难稳定复用，也很难随着模型和数据变化自动改进。过去大家常把多步推理、检索、重写、投票等流程硬编码成 pipeline，但优化目标分散，调参成本高，迁移性差。","importance":"这篇工作的重要性很高，属于方法框架级。它对 pretrain 本身不是直接改模型，但对 posttrain 和评测管线影响很大：如果 LM pipeline 可以像传统编译器那样，在给定指标和少量示例下自动搜索 prompt、模块组合和中间表示，那么很多“模型能力提升”其实会被重新分解为系统编排能力提升。这会改变我们对基础模型上限和 pipeline 增益来源的判断。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个声明式框架：用户只写任务结构和模块接口，系统再把这些 LM 调用“编译”成可优化的 pipeline。关键不在于多加几个 prompt trick，而在于把 prompt、检索、分解、self-consistency、工具调用等步骤抽象成可搜索的程序图，再用开发集上的指标驱动自动编译和选择。与 LangChain 这类偏 orchestration 的框架不同，DSPy更强调 optimization loop；与纯 prompt search 不同，它优化的是整个程序级结构。这样设计有效，因为很多 LM 任务的误差不是单步产生，而是由多步信息流和模块接口共同决定。","experiments":"这类工作的关键证据通常是：在问答、检索增强、数学、分类或 agentic 任务上，用同一基础模型，编译后的 pipeline 超过人工 prompt 或现有 pipeline 设计，而且开发成本更低。没有摘要和具体数字，不能可靠给出提升幅度。值得关注的实验包括：不同模型族之间的迁移是否稳、开发集规模多小还能编译出有效程序、以及性能提升主要来自 prompt 搜索还是来自程序结构重写；如果后两者占比高，这说明论文的真正贡献是把 LM 系统从“脚本堆砌”推进到“可优化程序”。","authors_note":"作者中 Omar Khattab 是检索增强与可组合 LM 系统方向的代表人物之一。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a real shift in where LM performance comes from: many failures now arise from how multi-step LM pipelines are structured, not from the wording of a single prompt. Hand-written prompt pipelines are brittle, labor-intensive, and hard to adapt when the model, task, or data changes.","importance":"This is a framework-level contribution with broad practical impact. It does not change pretraining directly, but it changes how we should reason about post-training and evaluation: if LM pipelines can be automatically compiled and optimized from task declarations, then a meaningful part of observed progress comes from system-level optimization rather than from the base model alone.","technical_approach":"The core idea is a declarative programming model for LM systems, where users specify task structure and module signatures, and the system compiles that into an optimized pipeline. The novelty is not another prompt trick; it is treating prompts, retrieval, decomposition, voting, and tool use as parts of a program that can be searched and tuned against a metric on a development set. Compared with orchestration frameworks, DSPy focuses much more on optimization. Compared with pure prompt search, it optimizes the whole program graph.","experiments":"The key evidence in a paper like this is whether compiled pipelines outperform strong hand-written prompts and existing LM pipelines across tasks such as QA, retrieval-augmented generation, reasoning, or classification, while reducing manual engineering. No abstract or reliable numbers are available here, so exact gains should be left unstated. small development sets.","authors_note":"Omar Khattab is a notable researcher in retrieval-augmented and compositional LM 相比，它更强调自然语言可解释性和多维评价。这样有效是因为许多自动评测失败来自标准没有被显式表示。","experiments":"实验应聚焦 evaluator 与人类或强教师模型的一致性，包括评分相关性、pairwise preference 一致率、不同 rubric 下的泛化能力，以及作为训练反馈源时是否有用。由于没有摘要，无法可靠给出数据规模、模型参数和具体分数。更关键的实验应该是：跨任务和跨 rubric 的迁移是否稳、解释文本是否真的提升打分一致性、以及 evaluator 被对抗样本或格式噪声扰动时是否比普通 judge prompting 更稳。","authors_note":"作者中包含 Yejin Choi、Joel Jang、Shayne fine-grained evaluators. Existing judge-style prompting with strong proprietary models is expensive, opaque, and often inconsistent when asked to follow detailed rubrics.","importance":"This is an important evaluation-infrastructure contribution. In other words, stronger evaluators change the quality of training signals upstream.","technical_approach":"Prometheus appears to train or induce LMs to perform rubric-based, fine-grained evaluation rather than giving only a single scalar score or simple preference judgment. The likely ingredients are structured rubric-conditioned data, supervision on explanations and scores, and training objectives that enforce consistency with the rubric. This differs from simply distilling scores from a stronger judge, because the aim is to learn the act of evaluating against explicit criteria. It also differs from a standard reward model, which is usually less interpretable and less naturally multi-dimensional.","experiments":"The most relevant experiments should measure agreement with humans or strong teacher judges, consistency across rubrics, and usefulness as an automatic feedback source. Context Memory for Online Language Model Interaction","authors":["Jang-Hyun Kim","Junyoung Yeom","Sangdoo Yun","Hyun Oh Song"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/KimYYS24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/KimYYS24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=64kSvC4iPg","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：在线交互式语言模型在多轮对话中需要长期记忆，但把全部历史原样塞进上下文窗口既贵又低效，窗口再长也会被无关细节占满。过去常见做法是截断历史或做通用摘要，但前者直接丢信息，后者则常把真正会影响后续决策的状态压没。","importance":"它的重要性在于提出一种面向在线交互的上下文压缩思路。对长上下文预训练和 agent memory 研究的启示是：记忆问题不只是 window size 问题，更是表示形式问题；如果能把交互历史压成任务相关的紧凑状态，那么很多长上下文扩展的收益可以用更低成本获得。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 compressed context memory：把过去对话或交互轨迹编码成更短、更结构化的记忆表示，再与当前上下文一起供模型使用。与简单摘要不同，这类方法通常会区分“需要逐字保留的信息”和“可以状态化压缩的信息”，可能还会根据当前 query 动态检索或更新记忆。这样设计有效，因为长期交互里真正重要的是持续约束、用户偏好和任务状态，而不是每一句表面文本。代价是压缩不可逆，一旦记忆表示学坏了，后续回溯能力会明显下降。","experiments":"关键实验应比较原始长上下文、截断、摘要记忆以及所提压缩记忆方案，在多轮问答或交互任务上评估准确率、延迟和 token 开销。没有摘要和数字，不能确认具体 benchmark、模型规模和提升幅度。最值得看的 ablation 是：压缩率与性能之间的曲线、记忆更新频率的影响、以及在需要精确引用早期细节时性能是否显著退化；这决定方法更适合“状态追踪”还是“全文回忆”。","authors_note":"作者中 Sangdoo Yun、Hyun Oh Song 都是较活跃的机器学习研究者。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical limitation of online LM interaction: preserving long-term context across many turns without repeatedly feeding the full history. Simply extending the context window is expensive and often wasteful, while truncation and generic summarization can discard the details that actually matter later.","importance":"Its contribution is important at the systems-and-representation level. For long-context modeling and agent memory, the main lesson is that memory is not only a window-length problem; it is also a state representation problem. If interaction history can be compressed into a task-relevant memory state, some benefits of long context may be achieved much more efficiently.","technical_approach":"The method is a compressed context memory mechanism that turns prior dialogue or interaction history into a shorter, more structured representation for future use. Unlike plain summarization, this kind of design usually distinguishes between information that must remain verbatim and information that can be stored as state, and may update or retrieve memory conditioned on the current query. The approach is attractive because long-horizon interaction mostly depends on persistent constraints, preferences, and task state, not on every token of past text. The downside is irreversibility: once the compression drops a detail, later recovery becomes difficult.","experiments":"The right experiments should compare full-history prompting, truncation, summary-based memory, and the proposed compressed memory on multi-turn tasks, measuring both task success and token or latency savings. Rush"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/LeeMKC0CWR24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/LeeMKC0CWR24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=qPFsIbF3V6","category_id":"coding_agent","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文关注一个很实用的问题：把代码从一种语言自动迁移到另一种语言时，纯编译器规则方法覆盖不够，纯大语言模型生成又经常不保语义或不满足目标环境约束。过去 transpilation 往往在“可靠但死板”和“灵活但不稳”之间二选一，因此很难在真实代码库中大规模落地。","importance":"这项工作更偏代码生成与系统工程，但对 LLM 训练研究也有参考价值。它的重要性在于展示了一种把语言模型放进程序转换闭环的方法：让模型负责猜测高层意图或缺失映射，再让 sketch / compiler 约束负责收敛到可执行程序。这个思路对受约束生成、工具增强训练、以及让预训练模型服务严格语义任务都很有启发。","technical_approach":"核心方法可以从标题概括为 Guess & Sketch：语言模型先给出候选转换意图、结构或 API 映射，再由 sketch-based synthesis / transpilation 组件在约束空间内补全和验证代码。它不是让 LLM 直接端到端吐出最终程序，而是把 LLM 用在最擅长的模糊模式匹配上，把语义正确性留给后端搜索或编译检查。这样做有效的原因是，代码迁移里最难的是跨语言 idiom 和库调用映射，这部分人写规则成本高；而最终语法与类型正确性更适合用程序分析来兜底。","experiments":"当前没有摘要，因此无法确认源/目标语言、数据集规模、编译通过率或语义保持指标。按题目判断，实验应会与纯规则 transpiler、纯 LLM 生成以及可能的神经-符号混合方法比较，指标大概率包括 compile success、test pass rate 和人工评估。若要快速判断论文价值，应重点看失败案例：模型是错在语义推断、库替换，还是 sketch 搜索空间过大导致效率问题。","authors_note":"David Brooks 是较知名作者，在计算机体系结构与系统方向有代表性工作。其余信息无法从给定内容中可靠确认。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a practical gap in code transpilation: rule-based systems are reliable but narrow, while direct LLM generation is flexible but often fails on semantic preservation and target-environment constraints. Standard workflows often assume LoRA can absorb the damage, but that assumption becomes fragile at very low bit-widths.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with outsized practical impact. The main lesson is that quantization should not be optimized only for frozen-model fidelity; it should be optimized for post-quantization trainability. That matters for PEFT, continual adaptation, and any setting where low-bit weights are expected to remain plastic under small updates.","technical_approach":"LoftQ stands for LoRA-fine-tuning-aware quantization. The key idea is to choose or decompose quantized weights while accounting for what a low-rank adapter can later recover. This differs from the usual pipeline of applying generic PTQ and hoping LoRA fixes the rest. The design is compelling because LoRA has limited rank, so quantization error placed in high-rank directions is hard to undo, whereas error aligned with recoverable subspaces is much easier to compensate.","experiments":"The abstract is not included, so exact models, datasets, bit-widths, and gains should not be fabricated here. 认为哪些专家可互换”的弱监督信号；先合并冗余专家能保留路由语义，再压缩时破坏更小。与直接做 expert pruning 或蒸馏相比，这种方法更尊重 MoE 原有结构，但边界在于如果专家已经高度专门化，强行合并可能损伤长尾能力。","experiments":"虽然没有摘要，但这类论文通常会在主流 SMoE This work proposes autoregressive in-context distillation to internalize reasoning ability, reducing reliance on prompt engineering.","importance":"Method-level contribution at the pretrain-posttrain interface. Implications: (1) ICL reasoning can be distilled into model parameters, suggesting that pretraining data with reasoning chains may be more effective than simply scaling data volume; (2) the autoregressive distillation framework offers a new lens for understanding ICL mechanisms.","technical_approach":"Uses a strong model or oracle to generate context examples with reasoning traces, then trains the target model autoregressively on these structured contexts. This work interprets bias at the neuron level and proposes targeted mitigation.","importance":"Mechanism-analysis-level contribution. Pretrain implications: (1) neuron-level bias distribution reveals how pretraining data biases get encoded; (2) identifying and intervening on these neurons during pretraining could be more efficient than post-hoc debiasing. The paper focuses on analysis and posttrain intervention.","technical_approach":"Uses causal intervention (activation patching etc.) to locate neurons highly correlated with social biases, then applies targeted modifications (suppression or recalibration). Prior analyses focus on hidden states/attention snapshots, but rarely treat the generation dynamics as the semantic object.","importance":"This is primarily a representation/interpretability contribution: if semantics is encoded in trajectory structure, then training objectives and decoding choices (temperature, sampling, constrained decoding) directly shape the semantic representation we observe and align. For pretraining, it suggests that “how the model generates” can be as informative as “what it generates,” though it remains unclear how universal such trajectory-based semantics is across models and tasks.","technical_approach":"They build a learning/analysis pipeline that maps a generation trajectory (e.g., sequences of logits/hidden states/selected tokens) into a meaning representation, trained with contrastive or predictive objectives to be sensitive to semantic factors and invariant to surface forms. Key choices include how trajectories are sampled (greedy vs stochastic), which internal signals are used, and how positive/negative pairs are defined. Compared to standard sentence embeddings, the approach leverages internal dynamics to capture how the model arrives at an answer.","experiments":"No abstract was provided, so model sizes, datasets, and numeric results cannot be stated. Training likely mixes SFT on simulated trajectories with RL using interaction outcomes as rewards, and varies scenarios to cover power relations, politeness, trust, reciprocity, etc. The main trade-off is realism vs. controllability: richer simulations are more realistic but harder to validate and stabilize; stronger norm signals shape behavior but can overfit into templated “safe” responses.","experiments":"No abstract was provided, so model sizes, simulation scale, and numeric results cannot be stated. CoT has been treated largely as an empirical trick, with limited formal separation between “longer computation traces” and a fundamentally stronger model class.","importance":"This is a theory/clarification contribution: it formalizes CoT as providing explicit intermediate states that enable multi-step computation within the output sequence, expanding what can be represented/implemented for certain function classes. For pretraining, the implication is that if gains come from explicit intermediate state usage, then the distribution, length budget, and supervision of intermediate tokens become first-order design choices, not just prompting details.","technical_approach":"The work likely uses tools from computational complexity/formal language/circuit complexity to model CoT as an additional resource: generating and re-reading intermediate tokens acts like a work tape, increasing effective computation steps and accessible intermediate variables. The key point is that CoT does not change the Transformer operator set, but changes the available compute trajectory and state visibility; the benefit depends on allowing sufficient reasoning length and on training signals that teach the model to use it. Under tight length limits or weak training, the theoretical advantage may not materialize.","experiments":"No abstract was provided, so it is unclear whether there are empirical experiments; such papers are often theorem-driven with small demonstrations. 虽然早被 GELU / SwiGLU 等更平滑激活大量替代，但它的激活稀疏性可能带来显著的计算和存储优势，这部分价值被低估了。过去主流选择更关注最终 loss 和稳定性，而较少系统地问：如果硬件和稀疏执行一起考虑，ReLU 会不会重新变得划算。","importance":"这是架构与效率交叉的方法级工作。对 pretrain 的意义在于，它挑战了一个近乎默认的设计共识：更好的激活函数一定值得额外代价。若作者证明 ReLU 在 LLM 中能借助稀疏激活实现接近性能且显著降本，那会直接影响大规模训练和 serving 的算力配方。","technical_approach":"核心思路是重新审视 ReLU，并显式利用其产生的大量零激活，而不是把它当成落后基线。有效性的关键在于两点：一是训练上要避免 ReLU 常见的优化与表达劣势，二是系统上要把激活稀疏真正转化为收益，否则零值只是统计现象。它和现有 LLM 激活设计的区别不是小改公式，而是把‘可稀疏执行’作为一等目标来做架构选择。","experiments":"当前信息无法确认模型规模、训练 token 数和具体收益。按题目推断，实验应比较 ReLU 与 GELU/SwiGLU Existing MoE practice often relies on ad-hoc auxiliary losses and capacity factors, with limited explanatory guidance for stability and load balancing.","importance":"This is mainly a theory/interpretation contribution with potential design guidance: it models gating as a sparse selection/estimation problem to explain instability, expert collapse, and gradient bias induced by top-k truncation. Manning","Chelsea Finn","Stefano Ermon"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/NicksMRSMFE24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/NicksMRSMFE24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=4eJDMjYZZG","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：现有“LM 输出检测器”（如检测 AI 写作、检测水印/风格特征）在对抗性优化面前是否可靠，结论是它们很容易被针对性地优化绕过。过去很多检测工作默认攻击者只做简单改写或温和采样调整，但真实场景里攻击者会直接把“躲过检测”当目标来优化。","importance":"贡献是“负面但关键”的安全结论：把检测器当作部署防线是不稳的，因为它提供了可微或可搜索的攻击面。对预训练与对齐的启示是：如果你依赖检测器做内容治理或数据清洗，攻击者或数据污染者可以系统性地把样本推到检测盲区；更稳的方向通常是端侧溯源、水印与协议层约束，或把检测信号纳入更强的多信号审计。","technical_approach":"方法上是构造可优化的规避攻击：在保持语义/任务得分的同时，最小化检测器分数或最大化“人类文本”判别概率。实现可能包括梯度近似（对离散 token 用 REINFORCE/straight-through/采样搜索）、或基于候选重写的黑盒优化；关键点是把检测器当作一个可被 query 的函数，攻击者可以用迭代搜索把输出推到决策边界另一侧。","experiments":"未提供摘要，无法给出具体检测器集合、攻击预算、成功率数字与基准数据集。合理预期是：覆盖多类检测器（开源/商用、基于困惑度/分类器/特征），在多个生成任务上报告攻击前后 AUROC、FPR@TPR、以及在相同可读性/语义保持约束下的绕过成功率，并做攻击步数/查询次数的消融。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tests a deployment-critical assumption: whether LM-generated-text detectors remain reliable under adaptive adversaries, and finds they are easy to optimize against. Much prior detector evaluation assumes mild paraphrasing or sampling tweaks, while real attackers directly optimize for evasion.","importance":"This is a negative but high-impact security result: detectors are brittle as a primary defense because they expose an optimizable objective. Standard autoregressive decoding is token-serial even when the document structure is already predictable.","importance":"This is an inference-efficiency contribution with training implications: it separates planning from realization, suggesting hierarchical generation objectives may better match compute constraints in pretrain/posttrain. It works because many long answers have paragraph-level dependencies more than token-level ones; fixing structure reduces cross-section coupling enough to parallelize. Prior understanding of prompt/prefix effects is largely empirical and lacks a framework for sharp boundaries.","importance":"This is a theory/mechanism contribution: it formalizes what it means for a capability to be accessible via prompts/prefixes and derives feasibility conditions. 闭环里的一个关键脆弱点明确化。它不是提出新的安全防御算法，而是给出一个警告：安全性不是一个可自动继承的性质，后续任务微调会重排参数中的行为边界。对大模型训练很重要，因为工业流程里最常见的不是攻击者，而是大量善意但未受控的 downstream adaptation。这个结论直接影响 cooldown、SFT mixing、safety replay 和 modular alignment 的设计。","technical_approach":"核心方法更像系统性实证研究，而不是新模型。作者应当构造一组“用户无恶意”的常规微调场景，例如领域适配、任务指令跟随或风格调整，然后测量安全行为如何退化。关键设计在于把恶意数据排除掉，从而证明风险来自分布迁移和目标错位，而不是明显有害 supervision。与常见 jailbreak 研究的区别是，这里攻击面不是推理时 prompt，而是训练时梯度更新。它之所以重要，是因为安全能力往往依赖少量脆弱边界；一旦下游 loss 只奖励任务完成，不奖励拒答或风险识别，这些边界就会被覆盖。边界是：结论强弱会依赖微调规模、冻结策略、LoRA vs full FT、以及是否混入安全数据。","experiments":"从给定信息里无法确认具体基座模型、参数量、微调任务、数据规模和安全指标下降幅度。合理的实验应包含至少三类比较：对齐模型 vs 未对齐模型；无恶意常规微调 vs 显式安全保持策略；参数高效微调 vs 全参数微调。最有价值的结果不是单次安全分下降，而是剂量效应，例如微调步数或数据量增加时安全性如何单调退化，以及加入少量 safety replay 是否能显著缓解。若论文严谨，还应区分“过度拒答减少”与“真正危险内容通过率上升”。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a practical and uncomfortable question: can an already aligned language model lose its safety properties through ordinary, non-malicious fine-tuning? Prior safety work has focused more on jailbreaks, adversarial prompting, or explicitly harmful finetunes. This paper instead studies the common industrial case where users simply adapt a model for benign tasks.","importance":"Its value is in exposing a fragile point in the pretrain-to-posttrain pipeline. The paper is not mainly a new defense; it is evidence that safety is not a property that automatically survives downstream adaptation. That matters because most real-world model updates are not attacks, but task-driven finetunes. The implication for training practice is immediate: safety replay, mixed-objective SFT, cooldown, and modular alignment should be treated as first-class design choices rather than afterthoughts.","technical_approach":"The work is best understood as a systematic empirical study. The likely setup is to take aligned base models, apply standard benign finetuning procedures such as domain adaptation or instruction tuning, and then evaluate safety degradation. The key design choice is to exclude obviously malicious data, so any loss of safety can be attributed to objective mismatch and representation drift rather than poisoned supervision. This differs from jailbreak-style work because the attack surface is not the prompt at inference time, but gradient updates during training. The mechanism is plausible: downstream losses reward task completion, not refusal boundaries or hazard recognition, so fragile safety behaviors can be overwritten. The boundary conditions matter a lot, including finetuning scale, LoRA versus full finetuning, freezing choices, and whether safety data is replayed.","experiments":"The provided information does not include verified model names, parameter counts, dataset sizes, or exact safety drops. A convincing evaluation should compare aligned versus non-aligned starting points, benign finetuning with and without safety-preserving strategies, and parameter-efficient versus full finetuning. The most informative result would be a dose-response curve: how safety changes as finetuning data or steps increase, and how much small amounts of safety replay can recover. A careful study should also separate reduced over-refusal from genuinely increased harmful compliance.","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","fine-tuning","safety","catastrophic-forgetting"],"notable_authors":["Xiangyu Qi","Yi Zeng","Tinghao Xie","Pin-Yu Chen","Ruoxi
