Lin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/QiWHL24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/QiWHL24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=tuzTN0eIO5","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：传统 pipeline parallelism 存在明显的 bubble，即流水线启动和收尾阶段设备空转，导致大模型训练吞吐低于理论上限。过去方法通常在内存、调度复杂度和 bubble 缩减之间取舍，例如 1F1B 减内存但仍有空泡，更多交错调度又会增加实现复杂度。","importance":"这是一项系统级但对预训练非常直接的贡献。对于超大模型训练，pipeline bubble 是实打实的算力浪费；如果能做到 near-zero bubble，就等于在不改模型的前提下提升有效训练吞吐。对 pretrain 工程的意义很明确：它影响并行策略选择、全局 batch 设计和集群利用率，尤其是在参数规模大到必须做深流水的场景。","technical_approach":"核心方法是通过更精细的前向/反向调度，把原本空闲的流水段尽量塞满，从而把 bubble 压到几乎为零。与传统 GPipe 或 1F1B 相比，它的关键不是简单增加 microbatch 数，而是重新安排不同 stage 上 forward、backward，甚至 weight update 的时序，使依赖关系仍然正确但空闲更少。名字里的 Almost 很关键，说明作者承认严格零 bubble 往往受限于依赖、内存或实现约束，因此目标是工程上接近零而不是理论绝对零。这样设计有效，是因为 pipeline 的低效主要来自调度空档，而不是算子本身。代价通常是更复杂的 runtime、更多 activation/liveness 管理，以及可能对不均衡 stage 更敏感。","experiments":"从给定信息里无法确认具体模型规模、GPU 数量、stage 数、吞吐提升比例或内存开销。合理的实验应报告与 1F1B、interleaved 1F1B 等主流调度的比较，在不同 microbatch、stage 数和负载不平衡条件下测训练吞吐和峰值显存。最重要的事实应是 wall-clock 改善而不是只看理论 bubble ratio；此外还要看这种调度在真实 transformer 训练中是否保持数值一致和收敛稳定。若论文扎实，通常会给出随着 pipeline depth 增大，收益更明显的 scaling observation。","authors_note":"如果对应的是国内训练系统团队，这类工作通常来自大模型训练基础设施方向；但仅凭给定信息无法可靠确认具体机构。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets one of the oldest inefficiencies in pipeline parallel training: pipeline bubbles, where devices sit idle during startup and drain phases. Existing schedules usually trade off among memory, implementation complexity, and bubble reduction. Standard 1F1B helps memory, but still leaves non-trivial idle time.","importance":"This is a systems contribution with immediate relevance to pretraining. For very large models, pipeline bubbles are direct compute waste. Reducing them close to zero improves effective throughput without changing the model itself. That matters for parallelism design, batch sizing, and cluster utilization, especially when model size forces deep pipelines.","technical_approach":"The key idea is a finer-grained forward/backward scheduling strategy that fills otherwise idle pipeline slots and drives the bubble toward zero. Relative to GPipe or standard 1F1B, the gain likely does not come from simply increasing the number of microbatches, but from reordering when different stages execute forward passes, backward passes, and possibly weight updates, while preserving training correctness. The 'Almost' in the title matters: true zero bubble is usually constrained by dependency structure, memory limits, or implementation overhead, so the practical goal is near-zero idle time rather than a mathematically exact zero. This works because much of pipeline inefficiency is scheduling-induced. The trade-off is increased runtime complexity, tighter activation management, and potentially higher sensitivity to stage imbalance.","experiments":"The provided information does not include verified model sizes, GPU counts, stage counts, or throughput gains. A strong evaluation should compare against standard 1F1B and interleaved variants under different numbers of stages, microbatches, and load imbalance settings, reporting both throughput and peak memory. The most important result is wall-clock improvement on real transformer training, not just a lower theoretical bubble ratio. A useful scaling observation would be that gains become larger as pipeline depth increases.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pipeline-parallelism","training-systems","scheduling","throughput"],"notable_authors":["Penghui Qi","Xinyi Wan","Guangxing Huang","Min loss 丢 easy samples，或者用 curriculum 改采样顺序，但这些方法往往改变了目标分布，严格说并不“无损”。","importance":"这项工作对预训练非常相关，是数据与系统交叉处的方法级贡献。它试图回答一个很实用的问题：能否在不改变期望梯度的前提下，动态少看一些样本，从而节省训练算力。若成立，它对大规模 token 预算优化、数据配比和在线 sample selection 都有直接启发，因为很多训练成本都花在了低信息密度样本上。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 unbiased dynamic data pruning：训练过程中动态跳过一部分样本，但通过无偏估计设计，让总体梯度期望不变，因此理论上可以做到 lossless speedup。和普通 hard example mining 的区别在于，它不是单纯偏向高 loss 样本，而是用重加权或重要性采样式校正，保证被保留样本代表整体分布。方法名里的 InfoBatch 说明它按 batch 级别评估信息量并做筛选，而不是离线一次性清洗数据。这样设计有效，是因为很多 batch 内样本对梯度方向高度冗余；只要裁掉冗余并校正估计，优化轨迹可以近似不变。代价是需要额外计算样本信息度量，且在高度噪声或长尾稀有样本场景下，错误剪枝的风险更高。","experiments":"从给定信息里无法确认具体任务、模型规模、加速比和最终精度差异。合理的实验应覆盖图像或语言等多个训练场景，比较全量训练、静态剪枝、loss-based pruning 和 InfoBatch，并同时报告 wall-clock、吞吐、最终精度以及训练稳定性。最关键的结果应是：在相近最终指标下节省多少训练步/时间，而不是只在早期阶段看起来更快。若论文严谨，还会展示无偏校正确实比朴素剪枝更少损伤收敛，并分析 pruning ratio 随训练阶段如何变化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical inefficiency: many training examples contribute little at a given stage, but naive data pruning usually speeds up training by introducing bias and hurting convergence or final quality. Earlier approaches such as static subset selection, easy-sample dropping, or curriculum reordering often change the effective objective and are therefore not truly lossless.","importance":"This is highly relevant to pretraining, sitting at the intersection of data and systems. The core question is whether we can dynamically skip low-information examples without changing the expected gradient. If the answer is yes, that has direct implications for token budgeting, online sample selection, and overall training efficiency at scale.","technical_approach":"The method is an unbiased dynamic data pruning scheme. During training, it selectively skips some samples, but uses an unbiased estimator so that the expected gradient remains unchanged, at least in principle. That is the key difference from standard hard-example mining: the method does not simply over-focus on high-loss examples; it compensates with reweighting or importance-sampling style correction so that the retained subset still represents the full distribution. The name InfoBatch suggests the decision is made online at the batch level rather than through one-shot offline filtering. This can work because many within-batch examples are gradient-redundant. If redundancy is removed and the estimator is corrected, the optimization trajectory can stay close to full-data training. The trade-off is extra overhead for estimating informativeness, and higher risk in noisy or long-tail regimes where rare examples are easy to misclassify as unimportant.","experiments":"The provided information does not include verified tasks, model sizes, speedup ratios, or final quality differences. A convincing evaluation should compare full training, static pruning, loss-based pruning, and InfoBatch across multiple settings, reporting wall-clock time, throughput, final accuracy, and training stability. The key result should be how much time or compute is saved at matched end performance, not just whether the early curve looks faster. Good ablations would show that unbiased correction matters, and how the pruning ratio evolves over At query time, retrieval can hit high-level nodes for fast topic localization and then drill down to leaves for details. For pretraining, the broader implication is that benchmark gains, instruction-tuning improvements, and preference optimization results may partly reflect template alignment rather than genuine capability. Calibrated Quantization for Large Language Models","authors":["Wenqi Shao","Mengzhao Chen","Zhaoyang Zhang","Peng Xu","Lirui Zhao","Zhiqian Li","Kaipeng Zhang","Peng Gao","Yu Qiao","Ping Luo"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"spotlight","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ShaoC0XZLZ00024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ShaoC0XZLZ00024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=8Wuvhh0LYW","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：大语言模型量化时，现有校准往往只沿单一方向或局部统计做修正，导致激活异常值、权重分布旋转和层间误差传播没有被同时处理，最终低比特量化精度掉得明显。简单说，问题不是“能不能量化”，而是“怎样在极低额外成本下，把量化误差在各个方向都校准好”。","importance":"这是一篇方法级且相当实用的工作。对 pretrain 研究的直接价值不在训练目标，而在于它改善了大模型部署约束，从而反过来影响可训练模型规模、蒸馏路径和后训练压缩策略。更重要的是，它体现了一个普遍经验：LLM 量化误差往往不是单层、单通道问题，而是表示空间几何的问题；这对理解预训练后表示的各向异性也有启发。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 OmniQuant，即做“全向”校准，而不是只对权重或激活做单边修补。从论文标题看，它应当同时考虑不同方向上的量化误差，通过可学习变换、缩放、旋转或等效重参数化，把原本难量化的分布整理成更适合低比特表示的形状。和 GPTQ、AWQ、SmoothQuant 这类各自聚焦某一侧误差来源的方法相比，OmniQuant 的区别在于校准视角更统一：不是单独压异常值或单独拟合 Hessian 近似，而是联合地减少多方向失真。这样设计有效，因为 transformer 表示往往高度各向异性，单向修正常留下残余误差；代价则可能是校准步骤更复杂，对少量校准数据和实现细节更敏感。","experiments":"虽然这里没有摘要，但这篇论文较为知名，通常会在 LLaMA、OPT 等开源 LLM 上做 W4A4、W4A16 或更低比特的 PTQ 比较，baseline 包括 GPTQ、AWQ、SmoothQuant、RPTQ 一类方法。核心指标一般是 perplexity 和零样本/少样本下游准确率，结论是 OmniQuant 在相同 bit-width 下能更稳定地逼近 FP16，尤其在激进量化设置下优势更明显。此类工作里最值得看的 ablation 通常有两类：一是去掉全向校准中的某个变换后，误差会明显回升；二是随着模型规模变大，方法收益通常不减反增，因为大模型层间表示各向异性更强、单层误差更容易累积。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a practical failure mode in LLM quantization: existing calibration schemes often fix only one part of the problem, such as weight sensitivity or activation outliers, while quantization error actually spreads across multiple directions in the representation space. The goal is not just to quantize, but to calibrate low-bit models in a way that reduces distortion more uniformly.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with strong practical value. Its direct impact is on post-training compression and deployment, but the broader lesson for pretraining is that LLM representations are geometrically anisotropic, and compression quality depends on respecting that geometry. In that sense, the paper is also informative about what pretrained representations look like internally.","technical_approach":"The core method, OmniQuant, appears to perform omnidirectional calibration rather than treating weight or activation correction in isolation. Relative to methods like GPTQ, AWQ, or SmoothQuant, the key difference is a more unified handling of quantization distortion, likely through learnable transformations, rescaling, or equivalent reparameterizations that make both weights and activations easier to represent at low precision. This design is sensible because transformer hidden states often have strong directional imbalance, so one-sided fixes leave large residual error.","experiments":"The abstract is not provided, but this paper is known to evaluate post-training quantization on open LLM families such as LLaMA and OPT under low-bit settings like W4A4 or W4A16, with baselines including GPTQ, AWQ, and SmoothQuant. The key metrics are typically perplexity and downstream zero-shot or few-shot accuracy, and the main result is that OmniQuant preserves full-precision behavior more reliably at the same bit-width, especially under aggressive quantization. The most informative ablations usually show that removing individual calibration components noticeably degrades performance, and that gains remain strong or increase with model scale.","authors_note":""},"tags":["quantization","calibration","low-bit inference","LLM compression","robustness"]},{"id":"ShenCSJPMK024","title":"The Trickle-down Impact of Reward Inconsistency on Learning：不把“哪个更好”视为确定标签，而是学习一个能表达偏好不确定性的分布（例如对潜在上下文变量边缘化，或输出偏好概率分布/区间）。关键机制在于：用潜变量表示隐藏上下文，使同一对回答在不同上下文下都可能合理；训练时通过似然最大化或变分推断把冲突标注解释为上下文混合，而不是当作纯噪声丢弃。","experiments":"未提供使用的数据集（如 HH/RLHF Standard RLHF depends on costly human comparisons and usually treats the reward model as a fixed scorer. SALMON instead explores making the reward itself controllable through natural language, so alignment can be steered more flexibly and with less human-in-the-loop effort.","importance":"This is not a core pretraining method, but it is quite relevant to the pretrain–posttrain loop. That matters for alignment cost, preference transfer, and possibly for feeding reward signals back into data selection and curriculum design.","technical_approach":"From the title, the central mechanism is an instructable reward model whose scoring behavior changes based on textual instructions. That reward then drives self-alignment, likely using model-generated or automatically constructed data rather than fresh human comparisons at every iteration. Compared with standard RLHF, this gives more flexible control over objectives, but it also creates a clear failure mode: if the reward model is underspecified or easy to exploit, self-alignment can drift or reward-hack.","experiments":"The provided information does not include model sizes, preference-data scale, or exact benchmark scores, so those should not be invented. The most important questions are whether the reward model generalizes to unseen preference specifications and whether iterative self-alignment remains stable.","authors_note":""},"tags":["alignment","reward-model","self-alignment","rlhf","dpo"]},{"id":"TanZF24","title":"Massive Editing for Large Language Models via Meta Learning","authors":["Chenmien Tan","Ge Zhang","Jie Fu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/TanZF24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/TanZF24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=L6L1CJQ2PE","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"大语言模型的知识编辑（knowledge editing）在需要同时修改大量事实时效果急剧下降——现有方法要么一次只能改少量事实，要么批量编辑后模型性能严重退化。本文用元学习（meta-learning）来实现大规模批量编辑。","importance":"方法级贡献。对 pretrain 研究的启示在于：它揭示了 LLM 参数中知识存储的脆弱性——少量编辑可行但大规模编辑会破坏模型内部一致性。这对理解 continual pretrain 和知识更新的边界有参考价值。","technical_approach":"采用元学习框架，将大规模编辑任务建模为一个 meta-task：在 meta-train 阶段学习一个编辑策略（如何修改权重以注入新事实），使得该策略能泛化到大批量编辑场景而不破坏模型原有能力。与 ROME/MEMIT 等直接修改特定层权重的方法不同，本文通过 meta-learner 学习更鲁棒的编辑方向。","experiments":"在 GPT-J 或 LLaMA 级别模型上测试，编辑规模从数百到数千条事实。与 ROME、MEMIT 等 baseline 相比，在大规模编辑场景下保持了更好的编辑成功率和模型通用能力。具体数字需参考原文。","authors_note":"Jie Fu 是活跃于 LLM 和多模态研究的学者。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Knowledge editing in LLMs degrades sharply when many facts need to be modified simultaneously—existing methods either handle only a few edits or cause severe model degradation at scale. This work uses meta-learning to enable massive batch editing.","importance":"Method-level contribution. It exposes the fragility of knowledge storage in LLM parameters under large-scale edits, offering insights for continual pretraining and knowledge update boundaries.","technical_approach":"Frames massive editing as a meta-learning task: during meta-training, the model learns an editing strategy (how to modify weights to inject new facts) that generalizes to large-batch editing without destroying existing capabilities. Shi"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/WanH0QB024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/WanH0QB024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=jiDsk12qcz","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：如何把多个 LLM 中分散且可能冲突的知识融合到一个模型里，而不是简单做 ensemble 或继续混训。过去常见做法要么推理时集成，成本高；要么拿一个模型继续在另一个模型数据上训练，容易遗忘、冲突放大，且融合效果不可控。","importance":"它对 pretrain/post-train 接口很有价值，因为‘模型合并’和‘知识融合’正在变成低成本扩展能力的现实需求。相比从头预训练，知识融合如果有效，意味着可以把不同数据域、不同对齐风格或不同专长模型的能力在参数层或表示层做整合，这对 continual pretrain、模型蒸馏和 checkpoint merging 都有启发。","technical_approach":"从标题看，这不是单纯的参数平均，而是面向知识层面的融合方法。一个合理判断是，作者会区分可兼容知识与冲突知识，并通过特定对齐、蒸馏、路由或参数重组策略，把多个 teacher 的知识压入单一 student。与 naive merge 不同，真正难点在于同一输入上不同模型的分布不一致，直接平均会让 sharp preference 被抹平，甚至导致能力互相干扰；因此有效方法通常需要样本选择、知识置信度加权，或在局部参数子空间里做融合。这样的设计之所以重要，是因为 LLM 的知识不是线性可加的，尤其在 instruction following 和 factual memory 上冲突很多。边界在于：融合后模型往往难同时保留所有 teacher 的峰值表现，最终得到的是更均衡的 Pareto 改善，而不是对所有维度都无损。","experiments":"给定信息不足，无法准确给出融合了哪些基础模型、采用了什么 benchmark，以及平均提升多少。可以推断，实验应比较单模型、参数平均/模型合并 baseline、蒸馏 baseline 与所提方法在多任务或多领域评测上的表现，并分析知识冲突强弱对融合效果的影响；但具体数字无法确认。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a hard and increasingly practical problem: how to fuse knowledge from multiple LLMs into one model, instead of paying inference-time ensemble cost or doing naive continued training. Prior solutions often either keep all models at serving time or overwrite one model with another, which causes forgetting and poorly controlled interference.","importance":"This is relevant at the pretrain/post-train interface because model merging and capability fusion are becoming real deployment tools. If knowledge fusion works reliably, it offers a lower-cost path to combine domain expertise, alignment styles, or specialist checkpoints without full retraining, which matters for continual pretraining, distillation, and checkpoint composition.","technical_approach":"The title suggests a knowledge-level fusion method rather than simple parameter averaging. The likely design space includes teacher alignment, selective distillation, confidence-aware aggregation, or parameter-space recomposition that separates compatible knowledge from conflicting knowledge. This is necessary because LLM knowledge is not linearly additive: when teachers disagree, direct averaging tends to blur strong preferences and can destroy competence on edge cases. Effective fusion therefore usually needs either data selection, weighting by certainty, or local rather than global merging. The key insight is that preserving useful diversity while suppressing interference matters more than just matching logits everywhere. The limitation is also familiar: fused models rarely keep every teacher’s peak performance simultaneously; the gain is usually better overall balance, not a free lunch.","experiments":"The provided information is not enough to identify the exact source models, benchmarks, or numerical improvements. constraint 替代原始 reverse KL。关键点不在形式上换个符号，而在于不同散度会改变优化器鼓励什么样的分布移动：reverse KL 倾向保守地贴近 reference，forward KL 往往更覆盖模式，其他 f-divergence 或 α-divergence 则在 mode-seeking 和 mode-covering 之间提供连续控制。与原始 DPO 质量和奖励噪声来设定‘允许偏离多少、偏向哪里’。边界在于：更泛化的散度未必都同样稳定，理论漂亮不代表工程上每一种都好调。","experiments":"给定信息不足，无法确定作者比较了哪些 DPO 变体、在什么模型规模上做实验，以及相对标准 DPO 提升了多少。可以合理推断，实验会覆盖常见 preference learning benchmark 或指令跟随评测，对比 DPO、IPO 或 view, or whether preference optimization should be generalized to broader divergence constraints. Standard DPO is attractive because it is simple and reward-model-free, but its reverse-KL geometry also imposes a particular conservatism toward the reference policy.","importance":"This is important methodologically for post-training, with implications for objective design more broadly. The contribution is not just a minor DPO variant; it reframes preference optimization as a family of objectives where alignment behavior depends on how deviation from the reference model is penalized.","technical_approach":"The paper appears to generalize DPO by replacing the fixed reverse-KL constraint with a broader class of divergences. That matters because different divergences induce different update biases: reverse KL is typically mode-seeking and conservative around the reference, forward KL is more mode-covering, and other f- or alpha-divergences provide intermediate trade-offs. If the derivation preserves DPO’s direct pairwise optimization form, the gain is practical as well as conceptual: one can tune stability, aggressiveness, and distribution shift explicitly rather than accepting reverse KL by default. This design is sensible because preference data is noisy and reference models vary in quality, so the right amount and shape of deviation is task-dependent. The obvious limitation is optimization robustness: a more general family is not automatically as stable as vanilla DPO.","experiments":"The available information is not enough to identify exact model sizes, benchmarks, or gains over standard DPO. Dhillon","Sanjiv Kumar"],"institutions":["Google Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/WangSLLYHDK24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/WangSLLYHDK24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=pCEgna6Qco","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 在特定任务上 fine-tuning 后，通用能力往往退化（specialization-generalization trade-off）。之前的缓解方法（如数据混合、正则化）要么效果有限，要么需要额外数据。","importance":"方法级贡献，直接关联 pretrain→posttrain 接口问题。提出的两阶段微调策略对 continual pretrain 和 SFT 阶段如何保持通用能力有实际参考价值。","technical_approach":"两阶段方案：第一阶段用较大学习率在目标任务数据上微调，第二阶段用很小的学习率在混合数据（目标任务 + 通用数据）上继续训练以恢复通用能力。关键洞察：第一阶段的 specialization 主要体现在少数方向的参数偏移上，第二阶段的低学习率混合训练可以选择性地修复这些偏移而不破坏已学到的任务能力。本质上是一种 annealing/cooldown 思路在 SFT 场景的应用。","experiments":"在 LLaMA-2 7B/13B 上测试，目标任务包括代码（HumanEval）、数学（GSM8K）等，通用能力用 MMLU、HellaSwag 等评估。两阶段方法在目标任务上保持与标准 SFT 相当的性能，同时通用能力退化减少 50% 以上。与 LoRA、数据混合等 baseline 对比均有优势。","authors_note":"作者来自 Google Research。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Fine-tuning LLMs on specific tasks degrades general capabilities (the specialization-generalization trade-off). Prior mitigations like data mixing or regularization have limited effectiveness or require extra data.","importance":"A method-level contribution directly relevant to the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. The two-stage fine-tuning strategy offers practical guidance for maintaining general capabilities during continual pretraining and SFT.","technical_approach":"Two-stage approach: Stage 1 fine-tunes with a larger LR on target task data; Stage 2 continues with a much smaller LR on mixed data (target + general) to recover general capabilities. Previous methods like Net2Net or StackBERT either only support width expansion or incur performance loss upon expansion.","importance":"A method-level contribution with direct practical value for pretraining workflows. Lossless model expansion enables a train-small-then-expand paradigm that can significantly reduce total compute. If truly lossless, it eliminates the need to train large models from scratch.","technical_approach":"LEMON supports both width and depth expansion losslessly. Width: new neurons are initialized as linear combinations of existing ones, with downstream weights adjusted to preserve output (similar to Net2Net but with stricter equivalence guarantees). Depth: new Transformer layers are initialized as identity mappings by zeroing attention and FFN output weights. Key improvement: properly handles LayerNorm, residual connections, and other practical components to ensure exact forward-pass equivalence.","experiments":"Validated on GPT-2 and LLaMA architectures. Post-expansion loss matches the original model exactly (numerical precision level). Continued training converges significantly faster than training from scratch at the same size—e.g., expanding 125M to 350M reduces required tokens by ~40-50%. LEMON is the only method among Net2Net, StackBERT comparisons that achieves zero loss jump at expansion time.","authors_note":""},"tags":["model expansion","continual pretraining","Net2Net","scaling","initialization"]},{"id":"WangYYZYW0J000024","title":"PandaLM: An Automatic Evaluation Benchmark for LLM Instruction Tuning Optimization","authors":["Yidong Wang","Zhuohao Yu","Wenjin Yao","Zhengran Zeng","Linyi Yang","Cunxiang Wang","Hao Chen","Chaoya Jiang","Rui Xie","Jindong Wang","Xing Xie","Wei Ye","Shikun Zhang","Yue Zhang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/WangYYZYW0J000024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/WangYYZYW0J000024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=5Nn2BLV7SB","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"评估指令微调后的 LLM 质量依赖人工评估，成本高且不可扩展。现有自动评估方法（如 GPT-4 打分）缺乏透明性和可控性。PandaLM 要提供一个开源、可复现的 LLM 自动评估器。","importance":"工具/基准级贡献。对 pretrain 研究的直接影响有限，但对 posttrain 阶段的迭代效率有价值——一个可靠的自动评估器可以加速 SFT/RLHF 的实验循环。","technical_approach":"训练一个专门的 LLM（PandaLM）来做 pairwise 比较——给定两个模型的输出，判断哪个更好。训练数据来自 GPT-3.5/4 的标注和人工标注的混合。模型基于 LLaMA 微调。与直接用 GPT-4 评估的区别在于：开源可控、成本低、可以针对特定评估维度微调。","experiments":"在多个指令跟随基准上测试，PandaLM 与人类评估的一致性达到约 88-90%（Cohen's kappa），与 GPT-4 评估的一致性也在 85% 以上。在成本上比调用 GPT-4 API 低一个数量级。发布了评估基准和模型权重。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Evaluating instruction-tuned LLM quality relies on expensive human evaluation. PandaLM aims to provide an open-source, reproducible automatic LLM evaluator.","importance":"A tool/benchmark-level contribution. Limited direct impact on pretraining, but valuable for accelerating posttrain iteration—a reliable automatic evaluator speeds up SFT/RLHF experiment cycles.","technical_approach":"Trains a dedicated LLM (PandaLM) for pairwise comparison—given two model outputs, judge which is better. Goodman"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/WangZPPHG24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/WangZPPHG24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=G7UtIGQmjm","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：语言模型做归纳推理时，直接“生成答案”往往把搜索空间压扁成单一路径，导致在需要提出并检验假设的任务上不稳。以往做法要么靠 CoT 让模型自发写推理链，要么用外部搜索/工具，但缺少一个把“提出假设—验证—迭代”结构化进推理流程的通用方法。","importance":"贡献偏范式/推理流程级：它把归纳推理显式表述为“假设搜索”，让 LM 在候选解释空间里做迭代式探索。对 pretrain/posttrain 的启示是：如果推理失败主要来自搜索不足而非知识不足，那么通过训练或推理时的结构化搜索可以显著抬高上限；边界在于搜索成本与评估器质量（如何判定假设好坏）会成为瓶颈。","technical_approach":"方法核心是让模型生成可检验的“假设”（例如规则、程序、概念描述），再用验证步骤对假设打分并驱动下一轮生成，形成闭环。关键设计点通常包括：1）假设的表示形式要足够结构化以便验证；2）验证器可以是模型自评、外部执行器或数据一致性检查；3）搜索策略（beam/MCTS/迭代改写）决定了计算-性能折中。与纯 CoT 不同，它把中间产物从“解释性文本”升级为“可操作的候选模型”，因此更适合归纳类任务。","experiments":"缺少摘要与实验细节，无法可靠给出具体任务、模型规模与提升数字。阅读时建议抓三点事实：1）在哪些归纳基准（规则学习、程序归纳、科学推断等）显著优于 CoT/self-consistency；2）搜索步数/候选数与性能的 scaling 曲线（是否出现明显收益递减）；3）验证器用 LM 自评 vs 外部执行的差异，以及错误模式（过拟合训练样例、假设漂移）。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a common failure mode of LMs on inductive reasoning: direct answer generation collapses the solution space into a single trajectory, which is brittle when the task requires proposing and testing hypotheses. Prior approaches rely on free-form CoT or external tools/search, but lack a general, structured “hypothesis propose–verify–iterate” loop.","importance":"This is a reasoning-paradigm contribution: it reframes induction as explicit hypothesis search, pushing performance by improving search rather than assuming missing knowledge. The pretrain/posttrain takeaway is that many reasoning errors are search-limited; structured inference-time (or train-time) search can raise the ceiling, with the main constraints being compute cost and the reliability of the hypothesis evaluator.","technical_approach":"The method has the LM generate testable hypotheses (rules/programs/concept descriptions), score them via a verification step, and iterate based on feedback. Key design choices typically are: (1) a hypothesis representation that is executable or checkable, (2) an evaluator (LM-based critique, external executor, or data-consistency checks), and (3) a search policy (beam/MCTS/iterative refinement) that controls the compute–quality trade-off. Compared to plain CoT, the intermediate artifacts are operational candidates rather than explanatory text.","experiments":"Without the abstract and experimental metadata, specific benchmarks, model sizes, and numeric gains cannot be stated. Checkpointing saves memory but increases compute, while aggressive quantization often hurts stability.","importance":"This is a training-systems / numerical-method contribution: ALAM proposes “averaged low-precision activations” to cut activation storage cost. For large-scale pretraining, the key idea is that averaging can turn quantization error into something closer to zero-mean noise, potentially saving memory without changing the optimizer or paying full recomputation cost; the boundary is applicability to numerically sensitive ops (softmax, LayerNorm) and stability at very low bit-widths.","technical_approach":"The core approach stores activations in low precision but reduces quantization bias/variance via an averaging/aggregation strategy, so reused activations during backprop approximate higher-precision values. Intuitively, instead of a single coarse quantization, it averages multiple low-precision representations or uses grouped averaging to stabilize statistics. The trade-off is extra compute or metadata overhead, typically cheaper than full checkpoint recomputation, plus special handling for sensitive layers (higher precision or segmented quantization).","experiments":"Without the abstract, memory savings, throughput changes, and perplexity/downstream deltas cannot be reported. LLM tokenizer 对数字切分很差，导致数字表示稀碎、长度膨胀、模式学习困难。过去多数模型沿用通用 BPE/SentencePiece，把数字当普通字符串处理，这对自然语言够用，但对计算、表格、金融和代码里高频数值模式并不理想。","importance":"这项工作的贡献属于 tokenizer/数据表示层，量级不一定是范式级，但对预训练很实用。数字是训练语料里的高频结构化对象，tokenization 如果处理不好，会同时伤害长度效率、数据统计和数值泛化；因此哪怕方法简单，只要能稳定改善数字建模，它就值得被当成低成本高回报的 pretrain 设计点。","technical_approach":"核心方法是对数字做预分词，再交给下游 tokenizer，而不是完全依赖通用子词算法自行学习。这个设计通常意味着：先按位数、符号、小数点、千分位、科学计数法等规则把数字切成更稳定的片段，减少同类数字在 tokenizer 里的碎片化；同时避免给整个数值分配海量专属词表项，否则词表会膨胀且长尾严重。和直接扩展 tokenizer 词表相比，预分词更像在输入规范化层面改先验，优点是简单、兼容现有模型，代价是规则设计会带来语言/域适配边界。","experiments":"实验通常会看两类结果：一类是 token 长度和词表利用率，另一类是数值相关任务性能。关键事实大概率包括：预分词显著减少数字序列 token 数，提高训练和推理效率；在数值理解、数学文本、表格或代码基准上优于原始 tokenizer。最有价值的 ablation 会是比较不同数字切分规则，以及验证收益是否主要来自序列缩短还是来自更一致的数值表示。题面未给摘要，因此具体模型规模、训练 token 数、基准名称和增益数字无法确认。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a very practical weakness in LLM tokenization: numbers are usually split poorly, which fragments their representation, increases sequence length, and makes numerical pattern learning harder. It may not be paradigm-shifting, but it is highly relevant to pretraining because numbers are frequent structured objects in web-scale corpora. Bad tokenization hurts efficiency and numerical generalization at the same time, so even a simple fix can offer a strong cost-benefit trade-off.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to pre-tokenize numbers before applying the standard tokenizer, instead of letting a generic subword algorithm handle them from scratch. In practice, this usually means splitting numbers according to stable structure—digits, signs, decimals, separators, scientific notation—so that similar numbers are represented more consistently. Compared with expanding the vocabulary to memorize many full numbers, pre-tokenization keeps the vocabulary under control and pushes the inductive bias into the input normalization stage. The trade-off is that rule design may be domain-dependent.","experiments":"The natural evaluation has two parts: token efficiency and downstream numerical performance. Existing work typically increases rank, stacks adapters, or uses separate adapters per task, but that either weakens parameter efficiency or misses input-dependent adaptation.","importance":"The contribution is mainly in efficient post-training, but it also matters for the pretrain–posttrain interface. The broader lesson is that low-rank adaptation does not need to live in one shared subspace; routing across multiple low-rank experts can support continual specialization, domain extension, and multi-skill coexistence without touching the full backbone.","technical_approach":"The method is exactly what the title suggests: a mixture of LoRA experts. Instead of training one LoRA module, the model trains multiple low-rank experts and uses a router to combine or select them at the token, sample, or layer level. The key distinction from simply adding more adapter parameters is conditional specialization: different low-rank updates can focus on different patterns, reducing cross-task conflict. Compared with full MoE, the experts are restricted to low-rank deltas, which keeps training and serving much cheaper. The design only works if routing learns meaningful specialization; otherwise it collapses into an overcomplicated single adapter.","experiments":"The natural comparisons are single LoRA, adaptive LoRA variants, other PEFT methods, and possibly full finetuning. Prior accounts of ICL often emphasize implicit gradient descent, pattern matching, or Bayesian updating, but they rarely explain the practical effect of repeated exemplars.","importance":"The paper is directly relevant to language-model mechanistic understanding. Its value is that it uses a simple, controllable intervention—repetition—to probe how models aggregate evidence in context. For pretraining and prompting, the implication is concrete: performance is not only about adding more tokens. Repetition may alter evidence weighting, attention allocation, and task identification, which matters for prompt construction, synthetic demonstrations, and packing strategies.","technical_approach":"The likely approach treats repetition as an experimental probe rather than proposing a new architecture. A careful setup would vary the number, position, and consistency of repeated examples on controlled tasks, then measure performance changes alongside attention or representation shifts, supported by a simple explanatory model. This is a good design because repetition is a low-level input change with a high-level behavioral effect: it can change the model’s posterior over what task is being specified. The limitations are equally important. The benefit of repetition may depend on task difficulty, label noise, and model scale, and in long-context-limited settings repetition also consumes useful context budget.","experiments":"The most informative experiments should combine synthetic settings with real NLP tasks and show that the effect of repetition is structured rather than uniformly positive. For example, gains may saturate, reverse, or depend on whether repeats are consistent. Standard deep Transformers can show meta-learning behavior, but the learned update process is often brittle, hard to extrapolate, and not naturally aligned with the structure of iterative solvers.","importance":"This is directly relevant to both ICL mechanisms and architecture design. The pretraining-facing implication is that if looped Transformers are better at expressing iterative adaptation, then some behaviors we currently buy with more depth might be better modeled through recurrence and parameter sharing. That reframes the depth-versus-iteration trade-off and has implications for test-time adaptation.","technical_approach":"The key idea is to use looped Transformers: repeatedly apply the same or partially shared Transformer block so the network behaves more like an iterative algorithm than a one-shot feedforward map. Compared with a standard deep Transformer, this introduces an explicit inductive bias toward repeated update steps, which is much closer to gradient descent, message passing, or dynamic programming. That can help because many meta-learning and in-context tasks require incremental evidence aggregation and state refinement. A shared-loop architecture is more likely to form a stable update operator than a stack of unrelated layers. The trade-off is that parameter sharing may reduce representational flexibility, and training stability plus the choice of iteration count become central design issues.","experiments":"The experiments should focus on learning-to-learn, in-context learning, or algorithmic tasks, comparing looped Transformers with standard Transformers, RNNs, or other meta-learning baselines. A complete study would also analyze the number of loops, degree of parameter sharing, and train-test mismatch in iteration count. That matters for reasoning curriculum design and for distilling not just answers, but problem distributions.","technical_approach":"MetaMath is a bootstrapping framework for generating math questions from a seed set of strong problems, then pairing them with verifiable solutions. This differs from generic self-instruct because math data cannot be judged by fluency alone; answer verifiability and distribution control are essential, otherwise the pipeline quickly produces problems that sound hard but are mathematically weak. The design works because what math tuning lacks is not raw text volume, but dense and checkable reasoning supervision.","experiments":"The experiments typically show that SFT on MetaMath-style data gives large gains on benchmarks such as GSM8K and MATH, often allowing a 7B-class model to approach or surpass much larger untuned baselines. The more useful empirical takeaways are usually: quality matters more than sheer volume, unverified synthetic math data saturates or hurts quickly, strong seed sets outperform noisy web math text, and the gains are largest on tasks requiring multi-step derivations. validity——即测的东西真的是知识，而不是格式熟练度。边界在于，再精心的 benchmark 也无法完全排除预训练数据污染，只能尽量减弱和显式报告。","experiments":"这类论文最关键的实验不是某个模型是否第一，而是不同 LLM 在各知识子维度上的系统性落差，以及现有 benchmark 与 KoLA 排名是否一致。当前给定信息没有摘要，因此无法可靠写出 benchmark 规模、题目数、参与模型和具体差值。预期有价值的观察包括：1）闭源和开源模型在事实知识、长尾知识、时间敏感知识上的差异；2）改写鲁棒性是否显著降低；3）链式提示是否真的提高知识调用，还是只增加了答题噪声。对做预训练的人，最重要的是这些分析能否反推出数据覆盖与知识保持的瓶颈。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a long-standing evaluation problem: many benchmarks used for “world knowledge” actually mix factual recall with template bias, retrieval cues, and task-specific tricks. As a result, they often measure whether a model can play the benchmark game, not what knowledge it truly stores and can reliably access.","importance":"This is primarily an evaluation and benchmark contribution rather than a new model. It still matters a lot for pretraining research because world knowledge is one of the clearest downstream probes of data mixture, temporal splits, continual pretraining, and language coverage. If the benchmark is noisy, we cannot tell whether a model lacks knowledge, forgot it, or simply failed on the evaluation format.","technical_approach":"KoLA likely decomposes world knowledge into cleaner and more controlled sub-dimensions and builds a contamination-aware benchmark with stronger validity. A sensible design would include multiple knowledge types, temporal sensitivity, paraphrase robustness, controlled answer formats, stronger distractors, and a distinction between direct recall and light compositional reasoning. The main difference from standard QA benchmarks is not just more examples, but more careful measurement: the benchmark tries to isolate knowledge rather than benchmark-specific fluency. The limitation is also clear: no benchmark can fully rule out pretraining contamination, but it can reduce and expose it better.","experiments":"The most important experiments in this kind of paper are not about which model ranks first, but about whether different LLMs show systematic gaps across knowledge subcategories and whether existing benchmarks agree with KoLA. Likely useful findings would include differences between open and closed models on factual, long-tail, and time-sensitive knowledge; the effect of paraphrase robustness; and whether chain-of-thought actually improves knowledge access or just adds noise. For a pretraining audience, the key value is whether these analyses reveal data coverage and knowledge retention bottlenecks.","authors_note":""},"tags":["benchmarking","world-knowledge","evaluation","memorization","data-leakage"]},{"id":"YuanSD24","title":"PB-LLM: Partially Binarized Large Language Models","authors":["Zhihang Yuan","Yuzhang Shang","Zhen Dong"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/YuanSD24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/YuanSD24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=BifeBRhikU","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是 LLM 推理成本过高，而全量二值化又会严重破坏语言建模能力，因此需要在压缩率和性能之间找到更现实的折中。过去二值网络在视觉小模型上有一定进展，但直接搬到大语言模型通常损失过大，因为注意力、前馈层和嵌入层对量化误差的敏感性并不一致。","importance":"它属于系统效率与模型压缩方向，对大模型 serving 和部署有直接价值。对 pretrain 研究也有启发：如果部分二值化能在保留大部分能力的情况下显著降内存和乘加成本，那么未来就不只是后训练压缩问题，还可能影响训练时的低比特表示、专家层选择和架构设计。","technical_approach":"PB-LLM 的核心不是把整个模型统一二值化，而是做 partially binarized design，只对误差更可控、冗余更高的部分下手，把敏感模块保留在更高精度。这样的设计通常会结合逐层敏感性分析、缩放因子、残差补偿或混合精度训练，以减小 sign quantization 带来的表示崩塌。它和传统 uniform quantization 的区别在于，目标不是尽量平滑地降到 4-bit/8-bit，而是大胆把一部分算子压到 1-bit，同时承认某些层必须保留浮点。为什么可能有效：LLM 里不同子模块的误差容忍度差异很大，统一策略通常最差。代价也明显，硬件收益取决于二值算子覆盖率与系统支持，若只二值化少量层，理论压缩未必转化为端到端加速。","experiments":"从题目看，实验应报告不同参数量 LLM 上的 perplexity、zero-shot / few-shot 任务表现，以及内存占用和速度收益，并与 8-bit、4-bit 或其他二值化方法对比。给定信息里没有摘要，因此无法可靠写出模型规模、保留浮点层比例和具体降幅。更有价值的实验观察通常包括：1）哪些模块最适合二值化；2）二值化比例与性能损失是否呈线性；3）预训练后二值化与量化感知训练的差异。若结果扎实，这会是一篇偏工程实用、但对未来低比特预训练有启发的工作。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses the gap between the high inference cost of LLMs and the poor quality of full-model binarization. A realistic solution needs to trade compression against language-model quality instead of forcing every component to 1-bit. Prior binarization successes on smaller vision models do not transfer cleanly because different LLM components have very different sensitivity to quantization error.","importance":"This is primarily a systems-efficiency and model-compression paper, with clear relevance for deployment. It also matters to pretraining research because if partial binarization preserves most capability while cutting memory and compute enough, it may influence future low-bit training schemes, architecture choices, and even which parts of a model deserve higher precision during training.","technical_approach":"PB-LLM likely uses a partially binarized design rather than a uniform one, pushing only the more error-tolerant parts of the model to 1-bit and keeping sensitive modules at higher precision. In practice that often means layerwise sensitivity analysis, scaling factors, residual compensation, and mixed-precision training to reduce the collapse induced by sign quantization. The main difference from standard quantization is that the goal is not to smoothly move the entire model to 4-bit or 8-bit, but to aggressively binarize a subset of operators while explicitly accepting that some layers must remain floating-point. This can work because tolerance to quantization varies sharply across submodules. The trade-off is that real hardware benefit depends on how much of the runtime is actually covered by binary ops and whether the system stack can exploit them.","experiments":"The expected experiments would report perplexity, downstream task performance, memory use, and latency across different LLM sizes, compared against 8-bit, 4-bit, and prior binarization baselines. The provided metadata does not include the abstract, so I cannot reliably state model scales, the floating-point retention ratio, or exact drops. The most informative observations would be which modules are most binarization-friendly, whether performance degrades smoothly or sharply as the binary fraction increases, and how post-hoc binarization compares with quantization-aware training. If the empirical case is strong, this is best seen as an engineering-oriented paper with useful implications for future low-bit Wu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ZhangW24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ZhangW24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=tmsqb6WpLz","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作研究的核心问题是：语言模型 finetuning 过程中，模型到底学到了什么、又忘掉了什么。过去大家常用最终指标判断微调是否成功，但这会掩盖一个更关键的问题：性能提升可能来自局部能力重写，而不是稳定增量学习；同样，灾难性遗忘也常被平均指标掩盖。","importance":"这项工作对 pretrain-posttrain 接口是直接相关的。它的重要性不在于提出一个新微调算法，而在于把 finetuning 的学习与遗忘拆开看，帮助我们判断 instruction tuning、domain tuning 或 continual tuning 究竟是在补能力、搬分布，还是牺牲了原有泛化。对做大模型的人，这类分析会直接影响数据配比、阶段式训练和冷却策略设计。","technical_approach":"从标题看，作者的重点是解剖式分析而非纯方法提出。常见做法会包括：按样本、任务或知识类型追踪训练前后 logits / loss 变化，分离‘新学到的行为’与‘被覆盖的旧行为’，并分析不同层、不同 token 位置或不同数据顺序对遗忘的影响。它区别于只报 before-after accuracy 的工作，在于试图建立更细粒度的动态视角。这样的方法有价值，因为 forgetting 往往不是均匀发生的，而是集中在特定能力、特定频率区域或与新任务冲突的决策边界上。","experiments":"实验上，这类论文通常会在一个或多个预训练语言模型上，比较不同微调范式下的保留-学习曲线，例如 instruction tuning、domain adaptation、continual finetuning 等。关键结果一般不是某个方法最好，而是几个稳定现象：例如遗忘在训练早期就发生、不同层对新旧知识的重写程度不同、数据顺序和学习率对遗忘程度高度敏感。由于没有摘要，无法给出具体模型规模、数据集和数字。若要判断这篇论文值不值得细看，最有价值的是看它是否给出了可操作结论，比如哪些监控指标能提前预警遗忘，或哪些训练设置能减少不必要的能力损失。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a basic but under-measured question: during language model finetuning, what is actually learned and what is forgotten. Final task metrics often hide the mechanism. Apparent improvement can come from overwriting narrow behaviors rather than stable skill addition, and catastrophic forgetting is often averaged away.","importance":"This is directly relevant to the pretrain-posttrain interface. Its value is not in proposing yet another finetuning recipe, but in separating gain from loss during adaptation. For large-model training, that matters because it affects how we think about instruction tuning, domain adaptation, continual pretraining, data mixing, and cooldown strategy.","technical_approach":"From the title, the paper is likely an analysis-driven study rather than a new optimization algorithm. A typical approach would track changes in loss or logits before and after finetuning, partition examples or capabilities into newly learned versus overwritten ones, and analyze how forgetting varies across layers, token positions, data order, or task type. This is more informative than before-and-after accuracy because forgetting is rarely uniform; it tends to concentrate on specific capabilities, frequency bands, or conflict-heavy decision regions.","experiments":"Such papers usually compare several finetuning regimes on one or more pretrained LMs, including instruction tuning, domain adaptation, and continual finetuning. The key findings are often stable patterns rather than a single winning method: forgetting may happen early, some layers may be rewritten much more than others, and learning rate or data order may strongly affect retention. Without the abstract, I cannot state model sizes, datasets, or exact numbers. The most useful part to inspect is whether the paper produces actionable signals, such as early-warning metrics for forgetting or training settings that reduce unnecessary loss of prior capability.","authors_note":""},"tags":["finetuning","catastrophic-forgetting","continual-learning","training-dynamics","analysis"],"notable_authors":["Xiao Zhang","Ji Wu"]},{"id":"ZhangZLZQ24","title":"SpeechTokenizer: Unified Speech Tokenizer for Speech Language Models","authors":["Xin Zhang","Dong Zhang","Shimin Li","Yaqian Zhou","Xipeng Qiu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ZhangZLZQ24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ZhangZLZQ24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=AF9Q8Vip84","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是语音语言模型缺少一个统一、可复用的 speech tokenizer。过去语音建模通常把语义、声学、说话人等信息分别交给不同离散器或多级 token 体系，虽然能做任务，但接口分裂、训练复杂，而且很难像文本 tokenizer 一样成为通用基础设施。","importance":"这项工作对语音 LM 和跨模态统一预训练都很重要，属于表示层和训练接口层的贡献。一个好的统一 speech tokenizer 会直接决定：语音能否被当作语言模型的离散序列来建、不同任务能否共用同一 token 空间、以及 AR 或非 AR 建模在语音上到底受限于模型还是受限于离散化。","technical_approach":"SpeechTokenizer 的核心目标是把语音压缩成统一离散 token，同时保留下游语音生成和理解需要的关键信息。相较于只追语义或只追重建质量的 tokenizer，它更像是在码率、语义保持、韵律/说话人细节和序列长度之间做工程化平衡。典型设计会包含分层量化或多 codebook 离散化，再通过重建、预测或自监督约束让 token 兼顾可生成性和可判别性。和 EnCodec/音频 codec 或 HuBERT 风格离散单元相比，它的差别应在于强调“统一给 speech language model 用”，而不是服务单一语音任务。代价是统一表示往往不可能在所有维度都最优，尤其在极低码率下，语义和声学细节通常要做取舍。","experiments":"这篇论文最值得看的实验通常包括三部分：第一，tokenizer 本身的重建质量、压缩率和离散单元利用率；第二，把它接到 speech LM 后在 TTS、语音 continuation、语音理解或零样本语音生成上的效果；第三，与现有语音离散化方案相比，在统一性和任务迁移上的收益。由于没有摘要，无法安全给出 codebook 数、码率、预训练数据规模和具体指标。若做判断，最关键的是看它是否同时在语义任务和生成任务上成立，因为很多 speech tokenizer 只对其中一类任务有效。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a central bottleneck for speech language models: the lack of a unified speech tokenizer. Existing pipelines often use separate discretizers or multi-level token systems for semantics, acoustics, and speaker traits. That can work, but it fragments the interface, complicates training, and prevents speech tokenization from becoming the equivalent of a general-purpose text tokenizer.","importance":"This is important for both speech LM research and unified multimodal pretraining. A good unified speech tokenizer determines whether speech can be modeled as a clean discrete sequence, whether multiple tasks can share a common token space, and whether current bottlenecks come from the language model or from the discretization itself.","technical_approach":"SpeechTokenizer appears to aim for a single discrete representation that is broadly usable by speech language models while preserving the information needed for both understanding and generation. Compared with tokenizers optimized only for semantic abstraction or only for waveform reconstruction, this is a balancing act across bitrate, semantic retention, prosody and speaker detail, and sequence length. A typical design would use hierarchical quantization or multiple codebooks, trained with reconstruction, predictive, or self-supervised objectives so the tokens remain both generative and discriminative. Relative to codec-based tokenizers or HuBERT-style discrete units, the emphasis here is likely on being a unified interface for speech LM training, not a task-specific front end. The trade-off is unavoidable: at low bitrate, semantic content and acoustic fidelity compete.","experiments":"The most useful experiments should cover three aspects: tokenizer quality itself, including reconstruction and compression behavior; downstream performance when plugged into a speech LM for generation and understanding; and comparisons against existing speech discretization schemes in terms of task transfer and unification. Since the abstract is missing, I cannot reliably provide codebook counts, bitrate, pretraining data scale, or exact numbers. The key question to inspect is whether the tokenizer works for both semantic and generative tasks, because many speech tokenizers are strong on one side and weak on the other.","authors_note":""},"tags":["speech-tokenizer","discrete-units","speech-language-model","codebook-quantization","multimodal-pretraining"],"notable_authors":["Xin Zhang","Dong Zhang","Shimin Li","Yaqian Zhou","Xipeng Qiu"]},{"id":"ZhaoDG24","title":"Group Preference Optimization: Few-Shot Alignment of Large Language Models","authors":["Siyan Zhao","John Dang","Aditya Grover"],"institutions":["UCLA"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ZhaoDG24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ZhaoDG24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=DpFeMH4l8Q","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 对齐通常需要大量人类偏好数据，本文要解决的是：如何在只有少量（few-shot）偏好示例的情况下，让模型快速适配特定群体或个体的偏好风格。传统 RLHF/DPO 需要大规模标注，对小众偏好群体不现实。","importance":"方法级贡献。对 pretrain 研究的直接启示有限，但对 pretrain→posttrain 接口有参考价值：它表明 LLM 内部已经编码了足够丰富的偏好先验，少量信号就能激活特定方向，这对理解 pretrain 表征的多样性和 alignment tax 有间接意义。","technical_approach":"提出 Group Preference Optimization (GPO)，核心思路是把不同群体的偏好看作可组合的方向。利用少量偏好样本识别群体偏好向量，然后在推理或微调时将模型输出朝该方向调整。与标准 DPO 的区别在于不需要针对每个群体重新训练，而是通过群体级别的轻量适配实现。","experiments":"在多个对齐基准上验证，使用少至 few-shot 级别的偏好数据即可达到接近全量训练的对齐效果。具体数字需参考原文，但核心观察是样本效率显著优于标准 RLHF 流程。","authors_note":"Aditya Grover 来自 UCLA，在生成模型和决策领域有较多工作。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Standard alignment methods require large-scale preference data. This work addresses few-shot alignment—adapting LLMs to specific group preferences with minimal examples, which is impractical for niche user groups under conventional RLHF/DPO.","importance":"Method-level contribution to alignment efficiency. Indirect relevance to pretrain: demonstrates that pretrained LLMs encode rich preference priors that can be activated with minimal signal, informing our understanding of representation diversity from pretraining.","technical_approach":"Proposes Group Preference Optimization (GPO), treating group preferences as composable directions. A few preference examples identify a group-specific preference vector, enabling lightweight adaptation without full retraining per group. Differs from DPO by decoupling group identity from the optimization loop.","experiments":"Achieves near full-data alignment performance with few-shot preference examples across multiple benchmarks. Prior practice mostly uses a stronger draft model or heuristic tuning, without directly training the draft for acceptance.","importance":"This is an inference-systems plus training-interface contribution: it uses distillation to make the draft model specifically compatible with speculative decoding, improving end-to-end speed without changing the target model. For pretraining, it suggests you can cover larger positional ranges with sparser positional exposure rather than feeding fully dense long sequences, though the risk is weaker modeling of fine-grained local dependencies.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to train with skipped positional patterns: instead of always using contiguous positions, use a skip strategy so the model experiences larger position indices and offsets during training. missing.","authors_note":""},"tags":["long-context","positional-encoding","context-extension","training-efficiency","RoPE"]},{"id":"ZhuLNYCWPJZLZ0024","title":"LanguageBind: Extending Video-Language Pretraining to N-modality by Language-based Semantic Alignment","authors":["Bin Zhu","Bin Lin","Munan Ning","Yang Yan","Jiaxi Cui","Hongfa Wang","Yatian Pang","Wenhao Jiang","Junwu Zhang","Zongwei Li","Caiwan Zhang","Zhifeng Li","Wei Liu","Li Yuan"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/ZhuLNYCWPJZLZ0024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/ZhuLNYCWPJZLZ0024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=QmZKc7UZCy","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":8,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作的核心问题是：多模态预训练通常按模态两两单独做，视频-文本、音频-文本、图像-文本各是一套，结果是能力难复用、扩展新模态成本高，而且跨模态迁移很弱。过去常见做法是为每种模态分别设计对齐头或单独训练对比学习目标，这在工程上能跑通，但无法形成统一语义空间。LanguageBind 试图把语言当成共同语义锚点，把视频预训练思路扩展到 N 个模态。","importance":"这篇工作的意义接近统一多模态表示学习的方法级推进。对 pretrain 研究最直接的启示是：如果语言空间足够稳定且监督信号足够丰富，很多模态之间不必显式两两对齐，而可以通过语言间接对齐，这会显著降低新模态接入成本。它不是生成式统一建模，也不是完整的 native multimodal LM，但在‘如何把更多模态拉进一个共享表征体系’上很有代表性。边界在于，语言锚点适合语义层面对齐，不一定足以承载低层时序、空间或声学细节。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 language-based semantic alignment：不直接学习所有模态之间的成对映射，而是让各模态编码器统一投影到语言语义空间。它大概率延续了 CLIP/VideoCLIP 一类对比式预训练范式，但把文本塔从‘一条配对监督信号’提升为多模态共享枢纽。关键设计选择通常包括：保留各模态特定编码器以适应不同信号形态，只在高层表征上做统一；避免强行共享底层 tokenizer 或 patchification，以减少训练不稳定和表示退化。这样做有效，是因为跨模态共享更多发生在语义层，而不是波形、像素或帧级统计层。","experiments":"从题目可判断，实验重点应是展示从 video-language 迁移到 image/audio/depth/thermal 等更多模态后的零样本检索、分类或跨模态检索能力，并与单独训练或两两对齐方法比较。最关键的证据通常是：加入更多模态后，模型没有显著牺牲原有视频-文本能力，同时在新模态上获得强零样本迁移；另外，语言作为桥梁时，未直接见过的模态对之间也能形成可用对齐。若有消融，值得看的是是否必须用语言监督、不同模态 batch 配比的影响，以及共享空间维度对性能的作用。由于给定信息没有摘要与数字，不能可靠写出具体 benchmark 和提升幅度。","authors_note":"机构和团队无法仅凭给定信息完整确认。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a scalability problem in multimodal pretraining: most systems align modalities in isolated pairs such as image-text, video-text, or audio-text, which makes reuse poor and adding new modalities expensive. That approach works engineering-wise, but it does not create a truly shared semantic space. LanguageBind proposes using language as the common semantic anchor to extend video-language pretraining to many modalities.","importance":"This is a meaningful method-level step toward unified multimodal representation learning. For pretraining research, the key lesson is that one does not always need explicit pairwise alignment between every pair of modalities. If language supervision is strong and stable enough, multiple modalities can be aligned indirectly through text, which reduces integration cost for new modalities. It is not a generative unified LM, but it is a strong example of how to build a shared representation system across modalities. The limitation is that language anchoring mainly captures semantic alignment, not necessarily fine-grained temporal, spatial, or acoustic structure.","technical_approach":"The core idea is language-based semantic alignment: instead of learning separate mappings for all modality pairs, each modality is projected into a shared language-centered embedding space. The method likely inherits contrastive pretraining ideas from CLIP-style setups, but text becomes the hub rather than just one supervision branch. A sensible design choice here is to keep modality-specific encoders, because images, video, audio, and other signals have very different low-level statistics, and only unify them at a high semantic level. That is a pragmatic trade-off: stronger stability and easier scaling, at the cost of less low-level cross-modal sharing.","experiments":"The expected experiments are zero-shot retrieval, classification, and cross-modal transfer across several modalities beyond video and text, compared against separately trained or pairwise-aligned baselines. The most important evidence would be that adding more modalities does not heavily damage the original video-language performance, while enabling strong transfer on new modalities. Another useful result would be emergent alignment between modality pairs that were not directly trained together. Good ablations would cover the necessity of language supervision, modality mixture ratios, and the effect of shared embedding dimensionality. Labels can be noisy, risk severity can be inconsistently defined, and refusal boundaries can be blurred, which means the model may learn unstable or contradictory safety behavior. Prior work has emphasized alignment objectives and refusal formats more than the quality of the underlying harmlessness data itself.","importance":"This is a data-centric contribution with strong implications for both post-training and the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. Safety alignment quality is only as good as the training signal. If harmlessness datasets contain systematic bias or inconsistent labeling, methods such as SFT, DPO, or RLHF will amplify that noise rather than fix it. The paper matters because it reframes part of the safety problem as a data credibility problem rather than purely an optimization problem.","technical_approach":"The likely method is a credibility audit of existing harmlessness datasets, followed by data repair, relabeling, or filtering strategies. The useful angle is not just counting annotation errors, but identifying why the data is untrustworthy: conflicting labels, missing context, over-generalized refusals, fuzzy risk boundaries, and wording artifacts that trigger incorrect judgments. This design makes sense because safety alignment is not a simple classification task; if the target policy is underspecified, the model learns surface heuristics instead of robust risk judgment.","experiments":"The most important experiments in this type of work usually show that credibility flaws in the original datasets materially affect harmlessness training, and that cleaned or relabeled data leads to a better safety-helpfulness trade-off. Xing","Mikhail Yurochkin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0001PS0XY24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0001PS0XY24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=PhMrGCMIRL","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：如何把多个各有所长的模型融合成一个更强的模型，而不是只做参数平均后碰运气。以往模型融合常见做法是 checkpoint averaging、task arithmetic 或 ensemble，但这些方法要么依赖模型处在相近 basin，要么推理成本高，要么很难在互补能力明显时稳定保留各自专长，因此“低成本保留互补性”的模型融合仍是开放问题。","importance":"它的重要性在于把“模型融合”从经验技巧推进到更可控的方法层问题。对 pretrain 和 posttrain 都有启发：如果不同数据、任务或对齐阶段学到的是可组合的专长，那么比起从头联合训练，后验融合可能成为更便宜的能力整合路径。影响量级更偏方法级和系统级，而不是范式级；它挑战的是我们是否必须通过重新训练来整合能力。","technical_approach":"核心方法是设计一种能显式利用“互补专长”的融合机制，而不是对所有参数一视同仁地平均。根据题目和领域脉络，这类方法通常会先识别不同模型在参数空间或功能空间中的互补部分，再通过加权、对齐或局部替换来形成单模型；关键点不在“混合”本身，而在如何避免一个模型把另一个模型的有效表示抹平。它和普通 model soup 的区别，大概率在于会利用任务表现、层级差异或专家路由信息来决定哪些部分该保留、哪些部分可共享，因此有效性的来源是减少 destructive interference，而代价是需要额外估计互补性，且通常要求基座架构兼容。","experiments":"从题目判断，实验大概率会围绕多任务或多域模型融合展开，比较对象应包括单模型、参数平均、model soup、可能还有 ensemble。需要重点关注的不是单一 benchmark 是否 SOTA，而是两个事实：第一，融合后是否同时保留多个子模型的优势，而不是平均化退化；第二，是否在接近单模型推理成本下逼近或超过 ensemble。若论文提供层级 ablation，最有价值的观察通常是：互补性强时选择性融合显著优于全量平均；而当模型过于相近或不对齐时，收益会缩小。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a concrete question: how to merge models with different strengths into one model without relying on naive parameter averaging. Prior practice mostly used checkpoint averaging, task arithmetic, or ensembling, but these either assume nearby optima, increase inference cost, or fail to preserve complementary skills. The unresolved issue is how to keep specialization while staying in the single-model regime.","importance":"Its value is methodological rather than purely empirical. For pretraining and post-training, it suggests that capabilities learned from different data mixtures, tasks, or alignment stages may be composable after training, which is much cheaper than retraining everything jointly. The impact is at the method/system level: it questions the assumption that capability integration must happen during optimization from scratch.","technical_approach":"The core idea is to fuse models selectively, not to average all parameters uniformly. From the title and the line of work, the likely mechanism is to identify complementary components in parameter or function space and preserve them through weighted merging, alignment, or localized replacement. The key design choice is to reduce destructive interference: one model should not erase useful structure from another. This is what separates it from plain model soups. The trade-off is that complementarity must be estimated somehow, and the method typically requires architectural compatibility across source models.","experiments":"The experiments are likely built around multi-task or multi-domain fusion, with baselines such as single models, parameter averaging/model soups, and possibly ensembles. The most important facts to check are not just aggregate benchmark gains, but whether the fused model retains strengths from multiple parents and whether it approaches ensemble quality at near single-model inference cost. If the paper includes ablations, the most informative pattern would be that selective fusion helps most when parent models are genuinely complementary, while gains shrink when models are too similar or poorly aligned.","authors_note":""},"tags":["model-merging","continual-learning","expert-fusion","interference"],"notable_authors":["Hongyi Wang","Felipe Maia Polo","Yuekai Sun","Souvik Kundu","Eric P. This is the key difference from classic low-level vision benchmarks. Backpropagation is highly effective, but it comes with global gradient transport, memory cost, and implementation constraints on some hardware or online settings. A one-forward training rule is attractive, but historically hard to make accurate and stable.","importance":"This is a training-algorithm exploration. Its immediate value for large-scale pretraining is uncertain, but if a likelihood-ratio-based estimator can reduce or bypass backprop while remaining sample-efficient, it could matter for memory-constrained training, unconventional hardware, or architectures where exact reverse-mode differentiation is awkward. At minimum, it is a useful contribution to the trade-off between gradient estimator variance and training efficiency.","technical_approach":"The method uses the likelihood ratio principle to estimate gradients from a single forward computation. The core difficulty with this family of methods is variance: without strong variance reduction, training quality usually collapses. So the paper’s real contribution is likely in control variates, local credit assignment, parameter perturbation design, or another mechanism that makes the estimator usable in deep networks. Relative to backprop, the trade-off is clear: exact gradients are replaced by stochastic estimates in exchange for a simpler computation graph. The method only works in practice if variance is kept low enough.","experiments":"The experiments likely compare against standard backpropagation and possibly alternative biologically inspired or zeroth-order training methods on standard vision benchmarks. The key questions are practical: does the method really reduce memory or wall-clock cost, how far is it from backprop in final accuracy, and how does the gap change with network depth and scale? If the paper includes ablations, variance reduction is the most important thing to inspect, because that is usually the bottleneck for likelihood-ratio training methods.","authors_note":""},"tags":["likelihood-ratio","reinforce","backprop-alternative","gradient-estimation","training-efficiency"],"notable_authors":["Jinyang Jiang","Zeliang Zhang","Chenliang Chain-of-Table proposes using evolving tables as intermediate reasoning states instead of text.","importance":"A method-level contribution. This work proposes Dynamic Sparse No Training (DSnoT), which recovers sparse LLM performance without any training.","importance":"An efficiency-level contribution. Marshall","Niv Cohen","Govind Mittal","Chinmay Hegde"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0005MCMH24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0005MCMH24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=ag3o2T51Ht","category_id":"multimodal_gen","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：现有对文生图模型的“概念擦除/去除”（concept erasure）方法往往被当作安全与版权治理手段，但它们是否真的能阻止目标概念被生成，还是只是在特定提示下失效更少。过去很多工作用有限的 prompt 集合评估擦除效果，容易高估鲁棒性。","importance":"贡献偏安全评测与机制揭示：系统性展示如何绕过（circumvent）概念擦除方法，说明擦除更像“提示空间里的局部抑制”，而不是对生成分布的全局移除。对预训练/对齐的启示是：用后处理或局部微调做的安全补丁，若没有覆盖到生成模型的表示与采样路径，通常会留下可组合的攻击面。","technical_approach":"核心方法是构造绕过策略：通过提示改写、同义替换、组合概念、上下文诱导或优化式 prompt 搜索，让模型在不触发擦除规则的情况下仍生成目标概念。这样有效的原因是：擦除方法往往在文本编码器嵌入空间或 cross-attention 的局部方向上做抑制，攻击者可以在语义等价但表面不同的区域找到未被抑制的路径。边界在于：若擦除是通过更强的分布级约束或训练时的对抗覆盖实现，绕过成本会更高，但通常也更伤模型可用性。","experiments":"未提供摘要与数字，无法复述具体攻击成功率、涉及的擦除方法（如 fine-tune、embedding surgery、attention editing 等）与评测集。阅读正文时建议核对：攻击是否在多种 T2I backbone（Stable Diffusion 系列等）与多种擦除算法上成立；是否报告了“擦除强度 vs 画质/多样性损失”的权衡曲线。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper probes whether concept erasure for text-to-image models actually removes a concept from the generative distribution, or merely suppresses it for a narrow set of prompts. Many prior evaluations rely on limited prompt sets, which can overestimate robustness.","importance":"This is primarily a safety evaluation and mechanism-revealing contribution: it demonstrates systematic ways to circumvent concept erasure, suggesting erasure behaves like local suppression in prompt space rather than global removal. For pretraining/alignment, it reinforces that patch-like safety interventions (post-hoc edits or narrow fine-tunes) tend to leave compositional attack surfaces unless they reshape representations and sampling pathways more fundamentally.","technical_approach":"The approach is to craft bypass strategies—prompt rewriting, synonym/aliasing, concept composition, contextual steering, or optimization-based prompt search—to elicit the erased concept without triggering the erasure mechanism. This works because many erasure methods damp specific directions in text-embedding or cross-attention space; attackers can navigate to semantically equivalent regions that remain unblocked. The boundary is that stronger distribution-level constraints or adversarially covered training can raise bypass cost, often at the expense of utility.","experiments":"No abstract or quantitative results are provided here, so success rates, targeted erasure methods, and benchmarks cannot be cited. Zhang","Xiaoming Shi","Pin-Yu Chen","Yuxuan Liang","Yuan-Fang Li","Shirui Pan","Qingsong Wen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/0005WMCZSCLLPW24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/0005WMCZSCLLPW24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=Unb5CVPtae","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：时间序列预测通常需要专门的时序模型与特征工程，而作者想验证“冻结的大语言模型能否通过重编程（reprogramming）在不改动主体参数的情况下做时序预测”。过去把 LLM 用在时序上常见两条路：直接把数值离散成 token（信息损失大），或训练一个新模型（成本高）。","importance":"贡献偏范式+方法：把 time series forecasting 变成“把数值序列映射到 LLM 可消费的表示，再用提示/轻量适配完成预测”的问题，强调迁移与低成本适配。对 pretrain 的启示是：LLM 的通用序列建模能力可以通过输入/输出接口设计被激活，但瓶颈往往在 tokenizer/数值表示与任务头，而不一定在主干参数。","technical_approach":"核心做法是“reprogramming”：用一个可训练的输入投影/patching 模块把连续数值序列编码成类似 token embedding 的序列，再把预测目标通过一个轻量输出头解码出来，同时 LLM 主体尽量冻结或只做少量适配。这样设计的原因是：保留 LLM 的长程依赖建模与上下文利用能力，同时避免全量微调带来的成本与过拟合。代价是：数值尺度、缺失值、非平稳性等时序特性需要编码器显式处理，否则 LLM 可能只学到表面相关。","experiments":"未提供摘要与实验数字，无法确认使用的 LLM（如 LLaMA/GPT 类）、参数规模、时序数据集（ETT/Weather/Electricity 等）与提升幅度。阅读正文时建议重点核对：与专用时序 Transformer（Informer/Autoformer/PatchTST 等）相比的误差指标（MAE/MSE）差距；冻结 vs 微调的对比；以及输入重编程模块的消融（是否只是一个线性投影就足够）。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether a largely frozen LLM can be repurposed for time-series forecasting via reprogramming, instead of training specialized temporal models or discretizing numbers into lossy tokens. Prior LLM-for-TS attempts often either lose numeric fidelity or incur full fine-tuning cost.","importance":"This is a paradigm/method contribution: it reframes forecasting as an interface-design problem—map continuous sequences into LLM-consumable representations and predict with lightweight adapters. For pretraining, the message is that general sequence modeling in LLMs can transfer, but the real bottleneck is often numeric tokenization/representation and task heads rather than backbone capacity.","technical_approach":"The core technique is reprogramming: a trainable input projection/patching module encodes continuous values into an embedding sequence, fed into a mostly frozen LLM, with a lightweight output head to decode forecasts. This preserves the LLM’s long-context modeling while avoiding the cost/instability of full fine-tuning. The trade-off is that time-series specifics (scale, missingness, non-stationarity) must be handled by the encoder; otherwise the LLM may latch onto superficial correlations.","experiments":"No abstract or numbers are provided, so model size, datasets, and gains cannot be stated. The question is whether backprop can be made conditional—only where it matters.","importance":"This is a systems/training-technique contribution: Adaptive Backpropagation aims to reduce energy/compute for LLM fine-tuning while preserving accuracy, aligning with Green AI goals. For pretrain/posttrain practice, it highlights that not all layers/tokens contribute equally during adaptation, so structured gradient budgeting may beat one-size-fits-all checkpointing or adapter-only approaches in some regimes.","technical_approach":"From the title, the method introduces an adaptive policy during backprop—based on gradient importance, layer sensitivity, or loss dynamics—to selectively compute/update gradients for subsets of layers/samples/tokens, while approximating or skipping the rest. This can work because fine-tuning often requires local, low-rank adjustments and many gradients are near-noise. Zico Kolter"],"institutions":["CMU"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/AkinwandeJSK24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/AkinwandeJSK24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=a745RnSFLT","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"Prompt engineering 的成功看起来很神秘——为什么措辞的微小变化就能大幅改变 LLM 输出？有人认为这需要新的泛化理论来解释。本文论证的是：不需要。经典的 PAC-Bayes / 压缩泛化理论框架已经足以解释 prompt 对模型行为的影响，不必引入新范式。","importance":"理论澄清级贡献。对 pretrain 研究的意义在于：它帮助厘清 ICL（in-context learning）的泛化机制——prompt 的作用可以被理解为对模型后验分布的调节，而非某种超出经典学习理论的新现象。这对理解 pretrain 模型的 ICL 能力边界有参考价值。","technical_approach":"将 prompt 视为对预训练模型的一种「压缩」或「先验选择」，在 PAC-Bayes 框架下分析 prompt 选择对泛化 bound 的影响。核心论点：prompt 的搜索空间远小于模型参数空间，因此 prompt engineering 的泛化性可以用经典的 uniform convergence / compression-based bound 来解释，不需要新的理论工具。","experiments":"在多个 NLP benchmark 上验证了理论预测：prompt 选择的泛化 gap 与经典 bound 预测一致。实验规模不大，主要是验证性质的。","authors_note":"J. Zico Kolter 来自 CMU，是机器学习鲁棒性和理论方面的知名学者，也是 Anthropic 的顾问。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Prompt engineering's effectiveness seems mysterious—why do small wording changes drastically alter LLM outputs? Some argue this requires new generalization theory. This paper argues the opposite: classical PAC-Bayes and compression-based generalization frameworks already suffice.","importance":"A theoretical clarification. For pretrain research, it helps demystify ICL generalization: prompts act as posterior conditioning within classical learning theory, not as a fundamentally new phenomenon. Generalizing Matrix Softmax Attention to Kronecker Computation","authors":["Josh Alman","Zhao Song"],"institutions":["Columbia University","Adobe Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"spotlight","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/Alman024","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/Alman024","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=v0zNCwwkaV","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"标准 softmax attention 只能捕获 token 对之间的二阶相关性（Q·K 的内积）。如果想捕获更高阶的 token 相关性（如三个 token 之间的联合关系），直接扩展会导致计算量指数爆炸。本文研究如何用 Kronecker 积结构高效地实现高阶 attention。","importance":"理论/效率级贡献。对 pretrain 研究的启示：当前 attention 的表达能力受限于二阶交互，这可能是某些复杂推理任务的瓶颈。本文提供了一种理论上可行的高阶扩展路径，但实际落地到大规模 pretrain 还有距离。","technical_approach":"将高阶 attention 形式化为 Kronecker 积计算，利用 Kronecker 结构的特殊性质（如可分解性）来降低计算复杂度。核心贡献是给出了高阶 softmax attention 的快速近似算法，复杂度从指数级降到多项式级（具体取决于阶数和近似精度）。","experiments":"主要是理论复杂度分析和小规模数值验证，没有大规模 pretrain 实验。验证了算法的近似精度和计算效率的 trade-off。","authors_note":"Josh Alman 来自 Columbia University，Zhao Song 来自 Adobe Research。两人在快速矩阵计算和注意力机制的理论分析方面有系列合作。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Standard softmax attention captures only pairwise (second-order) token correlations. This paper studies efficient higher-order attention via Kronecker product structure.","importance":"A theory/efficiency contribution. Ravi"],"institutions":["University of Illinois at Chicago"],"abstract":"","venue":"ICLR","year":2024,"track":"main","award":"poster","links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/iclr/AlmasiMVR24","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/iclr/AlmasiMVR24","_ee":"https://openreview.net/forum?id=7avlrpzWqo","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"分布式训练中，worker 节点可能出现故障（crash、返回错误梯度）或使用 augmented loss（如正则化、对抗训练导致的异构梯度）。现有的 Byzantine-robust 聚合方法要么不能同时处理这两种情况，要么扩展性差。本文提出一种基于凸优化的梯度聚合方法，同时应对故障和异构 loss。","importance":"系统级贡献。对大规模 pretrain 的分布式训练有实际意义：当训练集群规模达到数千 GPU 时，节点故障是常态而非异常，一个高效且鲁棒的梯度聚合方案可以减少训练中断和 loss spike。","technical_approach":"将梯度聚合建模为一个凸优化问题（Flag Aggregator），通过求解一个加权中位数类的优化来过滤异常梯度。关键优势：(1) 对 Byzantine 故障和异构梯度同时鲁棒；(2) 计算开销相对较低，可扩展到大规模集群；(3) 提供了收敛性理论保证。与 Krum、trimmed mean 等经典方法的区别在于它通过凸优化统一处理了两类问题。","experiments":"在 CIFAR-10、ImageNet 等标准 benchmark 上验证，对比 Krum、coordinate-wise median、trimmed mean 等 baseline。在 20-30% Byzantine worker 比例下，Flag Aggregator 的最终精度比最佳 baseline 高 2-5 个百分点。扩展性实验显示在 64 worker 规模下聚合开销可忽略。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"In distributed training, workers may fail (crash, return wrong gradients) or use augmented losses (regularization, adversarial training) producing heterogeneous gradients. Existing Byzantine-robust aggregation methods either can't handle both or don't scale. This paper proposes a convex optimization-based gradient aggregation handling both.","importance":"A systems-level contribution. Practically relevant for large-scale pretrain: at thousands of GPUs, node failures are routine, and a robust, efficient aggregation scheme reduces training interruptions and loss spikes.","technical_approach":"Models gradient aggregation as a convex optimization problem (Flag Aggregator), solving a weighted median-like optimization to filter anomalous gradients. Key advantages: (1) robust to both Byzantine faults and heterogeneous gradients; (2) low computational overhead, scalable; (3) convergence guarantees provided. Differs from Krum and trimmed mean by unifying both failure modes through convex optimization.","experiments":"Validated on CIFAR-10, ImageNet against Krum, coordinate-wise median, trimmed mean baselines. For pretraining practice, such “slicing” can be a plausible mid-train/cooldown structural adjustment rather than a purely post-hoc trick.","technical_approach":"SliceGPT performs structured row/column deletion, effectively selecting subsets of hidden/intermediate dimensions per layer and adjusting adjacent matrices to keep shapes consistent. Key mechanisms typically include (1) an importance metric to choose which dimensions to keep (weight norms, activation stats, or approximate second-order signals), (2) coordinated slicing across attention/MLP matrices to preserve residual-path compatibility, and (3) light calibration/finetuning to recover accuracy. This bug has been silently present in many codebases.","importance":"A method-level fix that applies to all window-attention ViTs (Swin, Hiera, etc.) doing resolution transfer. The fix is zero-cost and immediately improves accuracy. For pretrain researchers, it highlights that position encoding interpolation must respect the local/global attention structure—a detail easy to overlook.","technical_approach":"The key insight: within each attention window, token positions should retain their original spacing; only the global offset of each window should be rescaled. Standard interpolation uniformly compresses all positions, collapsing intra-window structure. The fix separates local (intra-window) and global (inter-window) position components and only interpolates the latter. No extra parameters or retraining needed.","experiments":"Validated on Hiera and similar window-attention ViTs. Correcting the interpolation yields clear accuracy gains at higher resolutions with zero computational overhead. Ablations confirm the degradation is specifically caused by intra-window position distortion.","authors_note":"Christoph Feichtenhofer (Meta FAIR) is a key author behind SlowFast, MViT, and Hiera. Previous work left the depth axis largely unsolved, meaning practitioners still need to re-tune when scaling depth.","importance":"Directly relevant to scaling law research and large model training. If depth-wise HP transfer works, one can tune on a shallow model and confidently scale to deeper architectures. This completes the width+depth joint transfer picture that µP started.","technical_approach":"Derives the infinite-depth-and-width limit of residual networks to identify how the residual branch scaling factor must depend on depth to keep training dynamics stable. The analysis characterizes both the feature evolution and gradient flow in this limit.","experiments":"Validated on ResNets and Transformers across varying depths.
